@apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy.tsx ‰∏≠ÁöÑ ÂØπ heading Â¢ûÂäÝ id ÁöÑÈÄªËæë
const normalizeHeadingIds = (headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]) => {
  const slugCountMap = new Map<string, number>()

  return headings.map((heading, index) => {
    const existingId = heading.id.trim()
    if (existingId) {
      const count = slugCountMap.get(existingId)
      if (count === undefined) {
        slugCountMap.set(existingId, 1)
        return heading
      }
      const uniqueId = `${existingId}-${count}`
      slugCountMap.set(existingId, count + 1)
      heading.id = uniqueId
      return heading
    }

    const baseSlug =
      textToSlug(heading.textContent || '') || `heading-${index + 1}`
    const count = slugCountMap.get(baseSlug)
    const generatedId = count === undefined ? baseSlug : `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    slugCountMap.set(baseSlug, (count ?? 0) + 1)
    heading.id = generatedId
    return heading
  })
}

const lexicalHeadingSelector = [
  'h1.rich-heading-h1',
  'h2.rich-heading-h2',
  'h3.rich-heading-h3',
  'h4.rich-heading-h4',
  'h5.rich-heading-h5',
  'h6.rich-heading-h6',
].join(',')

export const lexicalHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
  const headings = [
    ...container.querySelectorAll(lexicalHeadingSelector),
  ] as HTMLHeadingElement[]
  return normalizeHeadingIds(headings)
}

const TocHeadingStrategyContext = createContext<HeadingQueryStrategy>(
  markdownHeadingStrategy,
)

### **2. HEADING RENDERING (DETAILED)**

Located in `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx` (lines 44-70):

**Current heading implementation:**
- **Case statement**: `case 'heading':`
- **Heading tag selection**: Reads `node.tag` as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
- **Text extraction**: Uses `extractText(node)` helper to recursively pull all text from node children
- **Slug generation**: 
  - Calls `textToSlug(text)` to convert heading text into URL-safe format
  - **Slug algorithm**: Lowercase ‚Üí trim ‚Üí remove non-word chars (preserves CJK/Hangul: `\u3001-\u9fff`, `\uac00-\ud7af`, `\uff00-\uffef`) ‚Üí collapse underscores/spaces to hyphens ‚Üí strip leading/trailing hyphens
  - **Deduplication logic**: Uses `headingSlugs` Map to track existing slugs
    - First occurrence: slug registered with count=1
    - Subsequent duplicates: appended with `-{count}` suffix (e.g., `my-heading-1`, `my-heading-2`)
- **HTML structure**:
  ```jsx
  <Tag id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    {slug && (
      <a className="rich-heading-anchor" aria-hidden="true" tabIndex={-1} href={`#${slug}`} />
    )}
    {children}
  </Tag>
  ```
  - **ID attribute**: Applied only if slug is non-empty
  - **Anchor link**: Invisible anchor element with class `rich-heading-anchor`, aria-hidden, non-focusable, points to `#${slug}`
  - **Class name**: Dynamic based on heading level (e.g., `rich-heading-h2`)

**Slug utility location**: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/preprocess/headingSlug.ts` (exported for reuse)

### **3. ENGINE/renderBuiltinNode.tsx ‚Äî COMPREHENSIVE BREAKDOWN**

**Purpose**: Core renderer for 20+ built-in Lexical node types

**Key sections**:
- **Lines 10-17**: `textToSlug()` function (slug generation logic)
- **Lines 19-23**: `extractText()` helper (recursive text extraction from nested nodes)
- **Lines 25-226**: Main `renderBuiltinNode()` function with 20+ node type handlers

**Node types handled**:
1. `root` ‚Äî returns fragment of children
2. `paragraph` ‚Äî `<p>` with optional text alignment via `node.format`
3. `heading` ‚Äî **detailed above**, generates IDs + anchor links
4. `quote` ‚Äî `<blockquote class="rich-quote">`
5. `list` ‚Äî `<ol>` (numbered) or `<ul>` (unordered/checklist)
6. `listitem` ‚Äî `<li>` with detection of nested lists and checklist state
7. `link` ‚Äî `<a>` with LinkFavicon component + target/rel attributes
8. `autolink` ‚Äî similar to link but hardcoded `target="_blank"`, `rel="noopener"`
9. `horizontalrule` ‚Äî `<hr class="rich-hr">`
10. `table` ‚Äî wrapped in div with overflow-x auto
11. `tablerow` ‚Äî `<tr>`
12. `tablecell` ‚Äî `<th>` or `<td>` with colSpan support
13. `details` ‚Äî `<details>` with collapsible summary + animated chevron SVG
14. `spoiler` ‚Äî `<span class="rich-spoiler">` (button role)
15. `ruby` ‚Äî delegates to RendererWrapper (Japanese ruby annotations)
16. `code` ‚Äî `<pre><code>` (code block)
17. `code-highlight` ‚Äî `<span>` with syntax highlighting
18. `linebreak` ‚Äî `<br>`
19. `tab` ‚Äî two spaces wrapped in `<span>`
20. Default case ‚Äî returns null

**Key design patterns**:
- Recursive rendering via `renderTree()` (from RichRenderer.tsx)
- Passes `headingSlugs` Map down the tree for deduplication
- Some nodes delegate to `RendererWrapper` (ruby, custom renderers)
- Uses Vanilla Extract CSS for table styling

### **4. ID GENERATION & SLUG UTILITIES**

**Primary function**: `textToSlug()` in two locations:
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/preprocess/headingSlug.ts` (exported utility)
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx` (inline version)

**Algorithm** (identical in both):
```typescript
text
  .toLowerCase()                           // 1. Lowercase
  .trim()                                  // 2. Trim whitespace
  .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')  // 3. Remove non-word chars except CJK/Hangul/symbols
  .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')             // 4. Collapse whitespace/underscores to hyphens
  .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')             // 5. Strip leading/trailing hyphens
```

**Character ranges preserved**:
- `\w` ‚Äî standard word chars (a-z, 0-9, _)
- `\u3001-\u9fff` ‚Äî CJK unified ideographs (Chinese/Japanese/Korean characters)
- `\uac00-\ud7af` ‚Äî Hangul syllables (Korean)
- `\uff00-\uffef` ‚Äî Halfwidth/fullwidth forms (Japanese symbols)

**Deduplication in renderBuiltinNode** (lines 49-56):
```typescript
const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
if (count !== undefined) {
  slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
  headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
} else {
  headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
}
```

### **6. EXISTING HEADING ANCHOR LINK SUPPORT**

**YES ‚Äî heading anchor links are fully implemented!**

Current implementation (renderBuiltinNode.tsx, lines 58-70):
```jsx
<Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
  {slug && (
    <a
      className="rich-heading-anchor"
      aria-hidden="true"
      tabIndex={-1}
      href={`#${slug}`}
    />
  )}
  {children}
</Tag>
```

**Features**:
- **ID on heading**: `id={slug}` makes heading linkable
- **Anchor link element**: Invisible `<a>` with:
  - `aria-hidden="true"` ‚Äî hidden from screen readers
  - `tabIndex={-1}` ‚Äî non-focusable
  - `href={`#${slug}`}` ‚Äî points to heading ID
  - `class="rich-heading-anchor"` ‚Äî can be styled (e.g., show on hover)
- **Only rendered if slug exists** ‚Äî empty headings get no anchor
- **Deduplication**: Handles duplicate heading text (appends `-1`, `-2`, etc.)
- **I18n support**: Preserves CJK/Hangul characters in slugs

**CSS integration**: 
- Heading class: `rich-heading-{h1|h2|h3|h4|h5|h6}` (can style each level)
- Anchor class: `rich-heading-anchor` (can add `::before` pseudo-element, show on hover, etc.)

---

### **7. RENDERING PIPELINE (FROM DATA TO HTML)**

**Flow** (RichRenderer.tsx):
1. **Parse**: `editor.parseEditorState(value)` ‚Äî convert JSON ‚Üí Lexical editor state
2. **Read**: `editorState.read(() => ...)` ‚Äî enter read mode to traverse tree
3. **Render tree recursively**:
   - `renderTree()` processes each node depth-first
   - Calls `renderBuiltinNode()` for Lexical nodes
   - Passes `headingSlugs` Map down for deduplication
   - Wraps with `applyBlockId()` if `blockId` metadata exists
4. **Wrap in providers**: ColorSchemeProvider, RendererConfigProvider, etc.
5. **SSR output**: Fragment of React elements (can use `renderToString()`)

**Key context**:
- `headingSlugs`: Tracks used slugs across entire document (lines 89, 169, 204 in RichRenderer.tsx)
- Initialized fresh for each render: `const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()`
- Used only for heading deduplication, not stored

---

### **8. TABLE STYLING (Vanilla Extract)**

`table.css.ts` ‚Äî static CSS generation:
- **Wrapper**: `overflow-x: auto` for responsive tables
- **Table**: 100% width, small font, border-collapse
- **Header cells** (`th`): bottom border, secondary text color, no-wrap
- **Body cells** (`td`): padding, alternating bg colors
- **Hover states**: transparent on non-hovered even rows when any row hovered
- **Responsive**: paragraph margins reset inside cells

---

### **9. FOOTNOTE PREPROCESSING**

`preprocess/footnote.ts` ‚Äî preprocesses footnote data:
- **Walk entire state tree** recursively
- **Collect**: `footnote` nodes (by identifier) + `footnote-section` nodes (definitions)
- **Track display order** ‚Äî assigns counter 1, 2, 3... in encounter order
- **Return**: `{ definitions: Record<string, string>, displayNumberMap: Record<string, number> }`
- **Used in RichRenderer**: Passed to `FootnoteDefinitionsProvider` context

---

### **10. INTERNAL RENDERING MECHANICS**

**Text node rendering** (renderTextNode.tsx):
- **Format flags**: Bold (1), italic (2), strikethrough (4), underline (8), code (16), subscript (32), superscript (64), highlight (128)
- **Bitwise check**: `format & flag` to detect applied formatting
- **Nested spans**: Each format wraps previous in a new span with class (e.g., `rich-text-bold`)
- **CSS parsing**: `parseCSSText()` converts CSS string to React CSSProperties

**Custom node delegation**:
- Ruby nodes ‚Üí `RendererWrapper` with `RendererWrapper` component
- Allows injection of custom renderers via `rendererConfig` prop

---

### **11. BUILD CONFIGURATION**

**Vite setup** (vite.config.ts):
- Uses `createViteConfig()` helper (shared across packages)
- JSX: automatic import from React
- Entry: `src/index.ts`
- Output: ESM `.mjs` + TypeScript declarations `.d.ts`

**TypeScript** (tsconfig.json):
- Target: ES2022
- Module: ESNext
- Strict mode enabled
- Declaration maps for debugging

## Summary: Heading ID Normalization and TocHeadingStrategy Usage

I've completed a thorough exploration of how heading ID normalization and the TocHeadingStrategy system work across the codebase. Here's the detailed analysis:

---

### 1. **TocHeadingStrategy Core Functions** (`<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy.tsx`)

#### Three Main Strategies:

| Function | Purpose | Used by |
|----------|---------|---------|
| **`textToSlug(text)`** | Converts heading text to URL-friendly slug | Core utility for ID generation |
| **`normalizeHeadingIds(headings)`** | Deduplicates heading IDs to prevent conflicts | `lexicalHeadingStrategy` |
| **`markdownHeadingStrategy`** | Queries markdown headings with `data-markdown-heading="true"` | Default strategy for markdown content |
| **`lexicalHeadingStrategy`** | Queries lexical editor headings (`.rich-heading-h1..h6`) + normalizes IDs | Used for lexical-formatted content |

**Key Logic - `textToSlug`:**
```typescript
text
  .toLowerCase()
  .trim()
  .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '') // Keep CJK + Korean
  .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
  .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '') // Trim leading/trailing dashes
```

**Key Logic - `normalizeHeadingIds`:**
- Maps existing IDs with deduplication counter
- Falls back to `textToSlug(textContent)` if heading has no ID
- Generates fallback `heading-${index+1}` if both ID and slug are empty
- Returns modified heading elements with unique IDs

#### Context Provider Pattern:

```typescript
<TocHeadingStrategyProvider
  contentFormat={data.contentFormat}  // 'lexical' or undefined
  content={data.content}
>
  {children}
</TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
```

Selects strategy based on `contentFormat === 'lexical'` to handle both markdown and lexical editor content.

---

### 2. **Usage Across Codebase**

#### A. **Page Layouts** (3 places pass the provider)

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(page-detail)/[slug]/layout.tsx`
- Wraps page detail content
- Receives `contentFormat` and `content` from `data`

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx`
- Wraps post content
- Used alongside `CurrentPostDataProvider` and `WrappedElementProvider`

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/notes/[id]/page.tsx`
- Wraps note content
- Used alongside `CurrentNoteDataProvider`

#### B. **TOC Components** (consume the strategy)

**`TocFAB`** - Mobile floating action button TOC:
```typescript
const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
setHeadings(queryHeadings($mainContentRender))  // Finds headings in MAIN_CONTENT_ID
```

**`TocAside`** - Desktop sidebar TOC:
```typescript
const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
const $headings = useMemo(() => {
  if (!$article) return []
  return queryHeadings($article)  // Queries from WrappedElementProvider
}, [$article, updated, queryHeadings])
```

**`TocTree`** - Renders heading tree:
- Extracts heading depth from `el.tagName.slice(1)` (h1‚Üí1, h2‚Üí2, etc.)
- Clones heading element and removes `del` and `.katex-container`
- Extracts title from `elClone.textContent`
- Creates `ITocItem` with `anchorId: el.id`
- Uses IntersectionObserver to track active heading
- Calls `springScrollToElement($el, -100)` on click

#### C. **Heading Renderers**

**Markdown Heading Component** (`<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/renderers/heading.tsx`):
```typescript
export const createMarkdownHeadingComponent = () => {
  let index = 0
  return (props: HeadingProps) => {
    const memoizedIndex = useMemo(() => {
      if (typeof ref.current === 'number') return ref.current
      ref.current = index++
      return ref.current
    }, [])
    return <MHeader index={memoizedIndex} {...props} />
  }
}

const MHeader = (props: HeadingProps & { index: number }) => {
  const { children, id, level, index } = props
  const nextId = `${index}__${id}`  // Prefixes ID with index
  return (
    <h{level}
      id={nextId}
      className="group flex items-center"
      data-markdown-heading="true"  // Tag for strategy query
    >
      <span>{children}</span>
      {isClient && (
        <a
          href={`#${nextId}`}
          onClick={(e) => {
            springScrollToElement(document.getElementById(nextId)!, -100)
            e.preventDefault()
          }}
        >
          <i className="i-mingcute-hashtag-line" />
        </a>
      )}
    </h{level}>
  )
}
```

---

### 3. **Lexical Heading Handling**

#### A. **Heading Anchor Plugin** (`<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin.tsx`)

Runs in editor (live):
```typescript
export function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  useEffect(() => {
    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
      usedSlugs.clear()
      for (const [nodeKey, mutation] of mutations) {
        if (mutation === 'destroyed') continue
        const dom = editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)
        if (!dom) continue
        const text = dom.textContent || ''
        const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
        if (!baseSlug) continue
        const slug = deduplicateSlug(baseSlug, usedSlugs)
        dom.id = slug
        // Add/update anchor link
        let anchor = dom.querySelector<HTMLAnchorElement>('.rich-heading-anchor')
        if (!anchor) {
          anchor = document.createElement('a')
          anchor.className = 'rich-heading-anchor'
          dom.prepend(anchor)
        }
        anchor.href = `#${slug}`
      }
    })
  }, [editor])
  return null
}
```

#### B. **Static Renderer** (`<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx`)

Runs during SSR/static rendering:
```typescript
case 'heading': {
  const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
  const text = extractText(node)
  const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
  let slug = baseSlug
  if (baseSlug) {
    const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    if (count !== undefined) {
      slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
      headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    } else {
      headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    }
  }
  return (
    <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
      {slug && (
        <a
          className="rich-heading-anchor"
          aria-hidden="true"
          tabIndex={-1}
          href={`#${slug}`}
        />
      )}
      {children}
    </Tag>
  )
}
```

---

### 4. **Scroller Function** (`<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/lib/scroller.ts`)

**`springScrollToElement(element, delta = 40)`**:
- Calculates element's top position via `offsetParent` traversal
- Adds delta offset (typically -40 or -100)
- Uses `motion/react`'s `animateValue` with spring physics:
  - `stiffness: 1000`, `damping: 250`
  - Smooth scroll with wheel/touchmove cancellation
  - Returns animation promise

Used in:
- **Markdown heading click handler:** `springScrollToElement(document.getElementById(nextId)!, -100)`
- **TOC item click handler:** `springScrollToElement($el, -100).then(() => setActiveId(anchorId))`
- **Footnote reference click:** `springScrollToElement(document.getElementById(id)!, -window.innerHeight / 2)`

---

### 5. **Data Flow Diagram**

```
Page Layout
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ TocHeadingStrategyProvider
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ contentFormat: 'lexical' | undefined
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ content: string | null
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ TocAside / TocFAB
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useTocHeadingStrategy() ‚Üí strategy function
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ queryHeadings($article) ‚Üí HTMLHeadingElement[]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Returns with normalized IDs
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ TocTree
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Extracts ITocItem[] from headings
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ IntersectionObserver for active tracking
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ On click: springScrollToElement() + setActiveId()
‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Content Rendering
    ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Markdown: MHeader (data-markdown-heading="true")
    ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ ID = `${index}__${slug}`
    ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Lexical: HeadingAnchorPlugin + renderBuiltinNode
        ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ ID = slug (with deduplication)
```

---

### 6. **Key Design Patterns**

1. **Strategy Pattern**: Context-based heading query selection
2. **Deduplication**: Slug counters prevent duplicate IDs
3. **Fallback Chain**: Existing ID ‚Üí textToSlug ‚Üí generated ID
4. **Index Prefixing**: Markdown uses `${index}__${id}` to ensure uniqueness
5. **Spring Animation**: Smooth scrolling with interrupt handling
6. **IntersectionObserver**: Real-time active heading tracking without scroll events

---

### 7. **CJK & Character Support**

Both `textToSlug` implementations preserve:
- CJK characters (`\u3001-\u9fff`)
- Korean Hangul (`\uac00-\ud7af`)
- CJK Symbols & Punctuation (`\uff00-\uffef`)
- Basic alphanumeric + hyphen

**Two variants:**
- **TocHeadingStrategy:** Uses strict regex
- **HeadingAnchorPlugin/renderBuiltinNode:** Identical logic (duplicated)
- **Markdown slugify:** Different approach (basic ASCII transliteration)

export function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  useEffect(() => {
    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
      // ÈÅçÂéÜÂèòÂåñÁöÑÊÝáÈ¢òËäÇÁÇπ
      // ÁîüÊàê slugÔºåËÆæÁΩÆ idÔºåÂàõÂª∫ÊàñÊõ¥Êñ∞ .rich-heading-anchor ÂÖÉÁ¥Ý
    })
  }, [editor])
  return null
}
```

     1‚Üíimport {

     5‚Üí  FootnoteDefinitionsProvider,

     8‚Üí  RendererConfigProvider,
     9‚Üí} from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'
    10‚Üíimport { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
    11‚Üíimport { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
    12‚Üíimport type { LexicalEditor, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
    13‚Üíimport { $getRoot } from 'lexical'
    14‚Üíimport {
    15‚Üí  cloneElement,
    16‚Üí  createElement,
    17‚Üí  isValidElement,
    18‚Üí  type ReactNode,
    19‚Üí} from 'react'
    20‚Üí
    21‚Üíimport { renderBuiltinNode } from './engine/renderBuiltinNode'
    22‚Üíimport { renderTextNode } from './engine/renderTextNode'
    23‚Üíimport { preprocessFootnotes } from './preprocess/footnote'
    24‚Üíimport type { RichRendererProps } from './types'
    25‚Üí
    26‚Üíinterface EditorConfig {
    27‚Üí  namespace: string
    28‚Üí  theme: Record<string, any>
    29‚Üí}
    30‚Üí
    31‚Üífunction wrapDecoration(
    32‚Üí  serialized: any,
    33‚Üí  key: string,
    34‚Üí  decoration: ReactNode,
    35‚Üí): ReactNode {
    36‚Üí  switch (serialized.type) {
    37‚Üí    case 'alert-quote':
    38‚Üí      return createElement(
    39‚Üí        'div',
    40‚Üí        { key, className: `rich-alert rich-alert-${serialized.alertType}` },
    41‚Üí        decoration,
    42‚Üí      )
    43‚Üí    case 'banner':
    44‚Üí      return createElement(
    45‚Üí        'div',
    46‚Üí        { key, className: `rich-banner rich-banner-${serialized.bannerType}` },
    47‚Üí        decoration,
    48‚Üí      )
    49‚Üí    case 'grid-container':
    50‚Üí      return createElement(
    51‚Üí        'div',
    52‚Üí        { key, className: 'rich-grid-container' },
    53‚Üí        decoration,
    54‚Üí      )
    55‚Üí    default:
    56‚Üí      if (isValidElement(decoration)) {
    57‚Üí        return cloneElement(decoration, { key })
    58‚Üí      }
    59‚Üí      return decoration
    60‚Üí  }
    61‚Üí}
    62‚Üí
    63‚Üífunction applyBlockId(
    64‚Üí  element: ReactNode,
    65‚Üí  blockId: string | undefined,
    66‚Üí  nodeKey: string,
    67‚Üí): ReactNode {
    68‚Üí  if (!blockId) return element
    69‚Üí
    70‚Üí  if (isValidElement(element) && typeof element.type === 'string') {
    71‚Üí    return cloneElement(element as any, { 'data-block-id': blockId } as any)
    72‚Üí  }
    73‚Üí
    74‚Üí  return (
    75‚Üí    <div
    76‚Üí      key={`${nodeKey}-block-anchor`}
    77‚Üí      className="rich-block-anchor"
    78‚Üí      data-block-id={blockId}
    79‚Üí    >
    80‚Üí      {element}
    81‚Üí    </div>
    82‚Üí  )
    83‚Üí}
    84‚Üí
    85‚Üífunction renderTree(
    86‚Üí  node: any,
    87‚Üí  editor: LexicalEditor,
    88‚Üí  editorConfig: EditorConfig,
    89‚Üí  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    90‚Üí  key: string,
    91‚Üí  blockId?: string,
    92‚Üí): ReactNode {
    93‚Üí  const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key
    94‚Üí
    95‚Üí  if (typeof node.decorate === 'function') {
    96‚Üí    try {
    97‚Üí      const decoration = node.decorate(editor, editorConfig)
    98‚Üí      if (decoration != null) {
    99‚Üí        const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}
   100‚Üí        return applyBlockId(
   101‚Üí          wrapDecoration(serialized, nodeKey, decoration),
   102‚Üí          blockId,
   103‚Üí          nodeKey,
   104‚Üí        )
   105‚Üí      }
   106‚Üí    } catch {
   107‚Üí      /* fallthrough to builtin */
   108‚Üí    }
   109‚Üí  }
   110‚Üí
   111‚Üí  const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}
   112‚Üí
   113‚Üí  if (serialized.type === 'text') {
   114‚Üí    return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
   115‚Üí  }
   116‚Üí
   117‚Üí  let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
   118‚Üí  if (node.getChildren) {
   119‚Üí    const childNodes = node.getChildren()
   120‚Üí    if (childNodes.length > 0) {
   121‚Üí      children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
   122‚Üí        renderTree(
   123‚Üí          child,
   124‚Üí          editor,
   125‚Üí          editorConfig,
   126‚Üí          headingSlugs,
   127‚Üí          `${nodeKey}-${i}`,
   128‚Üí        ),
   129‚Üí      )
   130‚Üí    }
   131‚Üí  }
   132‚Üí
   133‚Üí  return applyBlockId(
   134‚Üí    renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs),
   135‚Üí    blockId,
   136‚Üí    nodeKey,
   137‚Üí  )
   138‚Üí}
   139‚Üí
   140‚Üífunction renderEditorToReact(
   141‚Üí  value: SerializedEditorState,
   142‚Üí  nodes: any[],
   143‚Üí): {
   144‚Üí  content: ReactNode
   145‚Üí  footnoteData: ReturnType<typeof preprocessFootnotes>
   146‚Üí  renderNestedContent: (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode
   147‚Üí} {
   148‚Üí  const editor = createHeadlessEditor({
   149‚Üí    nodes,
   150‚Üí    theme: editorTheme,
   151‚Üí    editable: false,
   152‚Üí    onError: (error: Error) => {
   153‚Üí      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
   154‚Üí    },
   155‚Üí  })
   156‚Üí
   157‚Üí  const editorConfig: EditorConfig = { namespace: 'ssr', theme: editorTheme }
   158‚Üí
   159‚Üí  const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(value)
   160‚Üí  editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   161‚Üí
   162‚Üí  const footnoteData = preprocessFootnotes(value)
   163‚Üí
   164‚Üí  const rawRootChildren = (value as any).root?.children as any[] | undefined
   165‚Üí
   166‚Üí  let content: ReactNode = null
   167‚Üí  editorState.read(() => {
   168‚Üí    const root = $getRoot()
   169‚Üí    const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
   170‚Üí    const children = root
   171‚Üí      .getChildren()
   172‚Üí      .map((child: any, i: number) =>
   173‚Üí        renderTree(
   174‚Üí          child,
   175‚Üí          editor,
   176‚Üí          editorConfig,
   177‚Üí          headingSlugs,
   178‚Üí          `ssr-${i}`,
   179‚Üí          rawRootChildren?.[i]?.$?.blockId,
   180‚Üí        ),
   181‚Üí      )
   182‚Üí    content = <>{children}</>
   183‚Üí  })
   184‚Üí
   185‚Üí  const renderNestedContent = (state: SerializedEditorState): ReactNode => {
   186‚Üí    const nestedEditor = createHeadlessEditor({
   187‚Üí      nodes,
   188‚Üí      theme: editorTheme,
   189‚Üí      editable: false,
   190‚Üí      onError: (error: Error) => {
   191‚Üí        console.error('[RichRenderer:nested]', error)
   192‚Üí      },
   193‚Üí    })
   194‚Üí    const nestedEditorConfig: EditorConfig = {
   195‚Üí      namespace: 'ssr-nested',
   196‚Üí      theme: editorTheme,
   197‚Üí    }
   198‚Üí    const nestedState = nestedEditor.parseEditorState(state)
   199‚Üí    nestedEditor.setEditorState(nestedState)
   200‚Üí    let nested: ReactNode = null
   201‚Üí    const nestedRawChildren = (state as any).root?.children as any[] | undefined
   202‚Üí    nestedState.read(() => {
   203‚Üí      const root = $getRoot()
   204‚Üí      const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
   205‚Üí      const ch = root
   206‚Üí        .getChildren()
   207‚Üí        .map((child: any, i: number) =>
   208‚Üí          renderTree(
   209‚Üí            child,
   210‚Üí            nestedEditor,
   211‚Üí            nestedEditorConfig,
   212‚Üí            headingSlugs,
   213‚Üí            `nested-${i}`,
   214‚Üí            nestedRawChildren?.[i]?.$?.blockId,
   215‚Üí          ),
   216‚Üí        )
   217‚Üí      nested = <>{ch}</>
   218‚Üí    })
   219‚Üí    return nested
   220‚Üí  }
   221‚Üí
   222‚Üí  return { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent }
   223‚Üí}
   224‚Üí
   225‚Üíexport function RichRenderer({
   226‚Üí  value,
   227‚Üí  variant = 'article',
   228‚Üí  theme = 'light',
   229‚Üí  className,
   230‚Üí  style,
   231‚Üí  as: Component = 'div',
   232‚Üí  rendererConfig,
   233‚Üí  extraNodes,
   234‚Üí}: RichRendererProps) {
   235‚Üí  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant)
   236‚Üí  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
   237‚Üí
   238‚Üí  const { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent } = renderEditorToReact(
   239‚Üí    value,
   240‚Üí    nodes,
   241‚Üí  )
   242‚Üí
   243‚Üí  const classes = ['rich-content', variantClass, className]
   244‚Üí    .filter(Boolean)
   245‚Üí    .join(' ')
   246‚Üí
   247‚Üí  return (
   248‚Üí    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass} theme={theme}>
   249‚Üí      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
   250‚Üí        <RendererConfigProvider
   251‚Üí          config={rendererConfig}
   252‚Üí          mode="renderer"
   253‚Üí          variant={variant}
   254‚Üí        >
   255‚Üí          <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
   256‚Üí            definitions={footnoteData.definitions}
   257‚Üí            displayNumberMap={footnoteData.displayNumberMap}
   258‚Üí          >
   259‚Üí            <NestedContentRendererProvider value={renderNestedContent}>
   260‚Üí              <Component
   261‚Üí                className={classes}
   262‚Üí                style={style}
   263‚Üí                data-theme={theme}
   264‚Üí                suppressHydrationWarning
   265‚Üí              >
   266‚Üí                {content}
   267‚Üí              </Component>
   268‚Üí            </NestedContentRendererProvider>
   269‚Üí          </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
   270‚Üí        </RendererConfigProvider>
   271‚Üí      </ColorSchemeProvider>
   272‚Üí    </PortalThemeProvider>
   273‚Üí  )
   274‚Üí}
   275‚Üí
```

    10‚Üífunction textToSlug(text: string): string {
    11‚Üí  return text
    12‚Üí    .toLowerCase()
    13‚Üí    .trim()
    14‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    15‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    16‚Üí    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')

    19‚Üífunction extractText(node: any): string {
    20‚Üí  if (node.text) return node.text
    21‚Üí  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
    22‚Üí  return ''
    23‚Üí}
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üíexport function renderBuiltinNode(
    26‚Üí  node: any,
    27‚Üí  key: string,
    28‚Üí  children: ReactNode[] | null,
    29‚Üí  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    30‚Üí): ReactNode {
    31‚Üí  switch (node.type) {
    32‚Üí    case 'root':
    33‚Üí      return <>{children}</>
    34‚Üí    case 'paragraph': {
    35‚Üí      const align = node.format
    36‚Üí        ? ({ textAlign: node.format } as const)
    37‚Üí        : undefined
    38‚Üí      return (
    39‚Üí        <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>
    40‚Üí          {children}
    41‚Üí        </p>
    42‚Üí      )
    43‚Üí    }
    44‚Üí    case 'heading': {
    45‚Üí      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    46‚Üí      const text = extractText(node)
    47‚Üí      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    48‚Üí      let slug = baseSlug
    49‚Üí      if (baseSlug) {
    50‚Üí        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    51‚Üí        if (count !== undefined) {
    52‚Üí          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    53‚Üí          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    54‚Üí        } else {
    55‚Üí          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    56‚Üí        }
    57‚Üí      }
    58‚Üí      return (
    59‚Üí        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    60‚Üí          {slug && (
    61‚Üí            <a
    62‚Üí              className="rich-heading-anchor"
    63‚Üí              aria-hidden="true"
    64‚Üí              tabIndex={-1}
    65‚Üí              href={`#${slug}`}
    66‚Üí            />
    67‚Üí          )}
    68‚Üí          {children}
    69‚Üí        </Tag>
    70‚Üí      )
    71‚Üí    }
    72‚Üí    case 'quote':
    73‚Üí      return (
    74‚Üí        <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">
    75‚Üí          {children}
    76‚Üí        </blockquote>
    77‚Üí      )
    78‚Üí    case 'list': {
    79‚Üí      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'

    84‚Üí            ? 'rich-checklist rich-list-ul'
    85‚Üí            : 'rich-list-ul'
    86‚Üí      return (

    89‚Üí          className={cls}
    90‚Üí          start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}
    91‚Üí        >
    92‚Üí          {children}
    93‚Üí        </Tag>
    94‚Üí      )
    95‚Üí    }
    96‚Üí    case 'listitem': {
    97‚Üí      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
    98‚Üí      const hasNestedList = node.children?.some((c: any) => c.type === 'list')
    99‚Üí      let cls: string
   100‚Üí      if (hasNestedList) {
   101‚Üí        cls = 'rich-list-nested-item'
   102‚Üí      } else if (isChecklist) {
   103‚Üí        cls = node.checked
   104‚Üí          ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked'
   105‚Üí          : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked'
   106‚Üí      } else {
   107‚Üí        cls = 'rich-list-item'
   108‚Üí      }
   109‚Üí      return (
   110‚Üí        <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>
   111‚Üí          {children}
   112‚Üí        </li>
   113‚Üí      )
   114‚Üí    }
   115‚Üí    case 'link':

   136‚Üí        >

   138‚Üí          {children}
   139‚Üí        </a>
   140‚Üí      )
   141‚Üí    case 'horizontalrule':
   142‚Üí      return <hr key={key} className="rich-hr" />
   143‚Üí    case 'table':

   166‚Üí    case 'details': {

   195‚Üí    case 'spoiler':

     1‚Üíimport type { CSSProperties, ReactNode } from 'react'
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíconst FORMAT_FLAGS: [number, string][] = [
     4‚Üí  [1, 'rich-text-bold'],
     5‚Üí  [2, 'rich-text-italic'],
     6‚Üí  [4, 'rich-text-strikethrough'],
     7‚Üí  [8, 'rich-text-underline'],
     8‚Üí  [16, 'rich-text-code'],
     9‚Üí  [32, 'rich-text-subscript'],
    10‚Üí  [64, 'rich-text-superscript'],
    11‚Üí  [128, 'rich-text-highlight'],
    12‚Üí]
    13‚Üí
    14‚Üífunction parseCSSText(cssText: string): CSSProperties {
    15‚Üí  const style: Record<string, string> = {}
    16‚Üí  for (const part of cssText.split(';')) {
    17‚Üí    const colonIndex = part.indexOf(':')
    18‚Üí    if (colonIndex === -1) continue
    19‚Üí    const prop = part.slice(0, colonIndex).trim()
    20‚Üí    const value = part.slice(colonIndex + 1).trim()
    21‚Üí    if (!prop || !value) continue
    22‚Üí    const camelProp = prop.replaceAll(/-([a-z])/g, (_, c: string) =>
    23‚Üí      c.toUpperCase(),
    24‚Üí    )
    25‚Üí    style[camelProp] = value
    26‚Üí  }
    27‚Üí  return style as CSSProperties
    28‚Üí}
    29‚Üí
    30‚Üíexport function renderTextNode(node: any, key: string): ReactNode {
    31‚Üí  let element: ReactNode = node.text
    32‚Üí  const format = node.format || 0
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí  for (const [flag, className] of FORMAT_FLAGS) {
    35‚Üí    if (format & flag) {
    36‚Üí      element = (
    37‚Üí        <span key={`${key}-${flag}`} className={className}>
    38‚Üí          {element}
    39‚Üí        </span>
    40‚Üí      )
    41‚Üí    }
    42‚Üí  }
    43‚Üí
    44‚Üí  if (node.style) {
    45‚Üí    element = (
    46‚Üí      <span key={key} style={parseCSSText(node.style)}>
    47‚Üí        {element}
    48‚Üí      </span>
    49‚Üí    )
    50‚Üí  }
    51‚Üí
    52‚Üí  return element
    53‚Üí}
    54‚Üí
```

    19‚Üí    .trim()
    20‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    21‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    22‚Üí    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    23‚Üí}
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üíconst normalizeHeadingIds = (headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]) => {
    26‚Üí  const slugCountMap = new Map<string, number>()
    27‚Üí
    28‚Üí  return headings.map((heading, index) => {
    29‚Üí    const existingId = heading.id.trim()
    30‚Üí    if (existingId) {
    31‚Üí      const count = slugCountMap.get(existingId)
    32‚Üí      if (count === undefined) {
    33‚Üí        slugCountMap.set(existingId, 1)
    34‚Üí        return heading
    35‚Üí      }
    36‚Üí      const uniqueId = `${existingId}-${count}`
    37‚Üí      slugCountMap.set(existingId, count + 1)
    38‚Üí      heading.id = uniqueId
    39‚Üí      return heading
    40‚Üí    }
    41‚Üí
    42‚Üí    const baseSlug =
    43‚Üí      textToSlug(heading.textContent || '') || `heading-${index + 1}`
    44‚Üí    const count = slugCountMap.get(baseSlug)
    45‚Üí    const generatedId = count === undefined ? baseSlug : `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    46‚Üí    slugCountMap.set(baseSlug, (count ?? 0) + 1)
    47‚Üí    heading.id = generatedId
    48‚Üí    return heading
    49‚Üí  })
    50‚Üí}
    51‚Üí
    52‚Üíconst lexicalHeadingSelector = [
    53‚Üí  'h1.rich-heading-h1',
    54‚Üí  'h2.rich-heading-h2',
    55‚Üí  'h3.rich-heading-h3',
    56‚Üí  'h4.rich-heading-h4',
    57‚Üí  'h5.rich-heading-h5',
    58‚Üí  'h6.rich-heading-h6',
    59‚Üí].join(',')
    60‚Üí
    61‚Üíexport const lexicalHeadingStrategy: HeadingQueryStrategy = (container) => {
    62‚Üí  const headings = [
    63‚Üí    ...container.querySelectorAll(lexicalHeadingSelector),
    64‚Üí  ] as HTMLHeadingElement[]
    65‚Üí  return normalizeHeadingIds(headings)
    66‚Üí}
    67‚Üí
    68‚Üíconst TocHeadingStrategyContext = createContext<HeadingQueryStrategy>(
    69‚Üí  markdownHeadingStrategy,
    70‚Üí)
    71‚Üí
    72‚Üíexport const useTocHeadingStrategy = () => use(TocHeadingStrategyContext)
    73‚Üí
    74‚Üíexport function TocHeadingStrategyProvider({
    75‚Üí  contentFormat,
    76‚Üí  content,
    77‚Üí  children,
    78‚Üí}: PropsWithChildren<{ contentFormat?: string; content?: string | null }>) {
    79‚Üí  const strategy = useMemo(
    80‚Üí    () =>
    81‚Üí      contentFormat === 'lexical' && content
    82‚Üí        ? lexicalHeadingStrategy
    83‚Üí        : markdownHeadingStrategy,
    84‚Üí    [contentFormat, content],
    85‚Üí  )
    86‚Üí  return (
    87‚Üí    <TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider value={strategy}>
    88‚Üí      {children}
    89‚Üí    </TocHeadingStrategyContext.Provider>
    90‚Üí  )
    91‚Üí}
    92‚Üí
```
</details></tool-use>

     1‚Üíimport type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíexport interface FootnoteData {
     4‚Üí  definitions: Record<string, string>
     5‚Üí  displayNumberMap: Record<string, number>
     6‚Üí}
     7‚Üí
     8‚Üíexport function preprocessFootnotes(
     9‚Üí  state: SerializedEditorState,
    10‚Üí): FootnoteData {
    11‚Üí  const definitions: Record<string, string> = {}
    12‚Üí  const seen = new Set<string>()
    13‚Üí  const displayNumberMap: Record<string, number> = {}
    14‚Üí  let counter = 1
    15‚Üí
    16‚Üí  function walk(node: any): void {
    17‚Üí    if (node.type === 'footnote' && node.identifier) {
    18‚Üí      const id = node.identifier
    19‚Üí      if (!seen.has(id)) {
    20‚Üí        seen.add(id)
    21‚Üí        displayNumberMap[id] = counter++
    22‚Üí      }
    23‚Üí    }
    24‚Üí    if (node.type === 'footnote-section' && node.definitions) {
    25‚Üí      Object.assign(definitions, node.definitions)
    26‚Üí    }
    27‚Üí    if (node.children) {
    28‚Üí      for (const child of node.children) walk(child)
    29‚Üí    }
    30‚Üí    if (node.root) walk(node.root)
    31‚Üí    if (node.content && typeof node.content === 'object' && node.content.root) {
    32‚Üí      walk(node.content)
    33‚Üí    }
    34‚Üí    if (node.cells && Array.isArray(node.cells)) {
    35‚Üí      for (const cell of node.cells) {
    36‚Üí        if (cell && cell.root) walk(cell)
    37‚Üí      }
    38‚Üí    }
    39‚Üí  }
    40‚Üí
    41‚Üí  walk(state)
    42‚Üí
    43‚Üí  for (const id of seen) {
    44‚Üí    if (!(id in definitions)) {
    45‚Üí      definitions[id] = ''
    46‚Üí    }
    47‚Üí  }
    48‚Üí
    49‚Üí  return { definitions, displayNumberMap }
    50‚Üí}
    51‚Üí
```
</details></tool-use>

    38‚Üí  backgroundColor: vars.color.bgSecondary,
    39‚Üí})
    40‚Üí
    41‚Üí// Clear alternating bg on non-hovered even rows when any row is hovered

    43‚Üí  `${table}:has(tr:hover) tr:has(${tableCell}):nth-child(even):not(:hover)`,
    44‚Üí  { backgroundColor: 'transparent' },
    45‚Üí)
    46‚Üí
    47‚Üí// Body row hover

    50‚Üí})
    51‚Üí

    54‚Üí})
    55‚Üí

    58‚Üí  margin: 0,

    60‚Üí  lineHeight: 'inherit',

    13‚Üí
    14‚Üíconst ITERATIONS = 100

    17‚Üí// ‚îÄ‚îÄ Stats helpers ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üífunction median(arr: number[]): number {
    20‚Üí  const sorted = [...arr].sort((a, b) => a - b)
    21‚Üí  const mid = Math.floor(sorted.length / 2)
    22‚Üí  return sorted.length % 2 ? sorted[mid] : (sorted[mid - 1] + sorted[mid]) / 2
    23‚Üí}
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üífunction p95(arr: number[]): number {
    26‚Üí  const sorted = [...arr].sort((a, b) => a - b)
    27‚Üí  return sorted[Math.floor(sorted.length * 0.95)]
    28‚Üí}
    29‚Üí
    30‚Üífunction stats(times: number[]) {
    31‚Üí  const avg = times.reduce((s, t) => s + t, 0) / times.length
    32‚Üí  const min = Math.min(...times)
    33‚Üí  const max = Math.max(...times)
    34‚Üí  return { avg, min, max, median: median(times), p95: p95(times) }
    35‚Üí}
    36‚Üí
    37‚Üífunction fmt(ms: number): string {
    38‚Üí  return `${ms.toFixed(2).padStart(8)} ms`
    39‚Üí}
    40‚Üí
    41‚Üífunction printStats(label: string, times: number[], htmlSize: number) {
    42‚Üí  const s = stats(times)
    43‚Üí  console.log(`  ${label}`)
    44‚Üí  console.log(`    HTML size: ${(htmlSize / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`)
    45‚Üí  console.log(
    46‚Üí    `    avg: ${fmt(s.avg)}  median: ${fmt(s.median)}  p95: ${fmt(s.p95)}`,
    47‚Üí  )
    48‚Üí  console.log(`    min: ${fmt(s.min)}  max:    ${fmt(s.max)}`)
    49‚Üí}
    50‚Üí
    51‚Üí// ‚îÄ‚îÄ Suppress RichRenderer errors for unknown node types ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    52‚Üí
    53‚Üí// Suppress noisy warnings during benchmark (unknown node types, React key warnings)
    54‚Üíconst origError = console.error
    55‚Üí
    56‚Üíconst suppress = (...args: any[]) => {
    57‚Üí  const msg = typeof args[0] === 'string' ? args[0] : ''
    58‚Üí  if (msg.startsWith('[RichRenderer') || msg.includes('is not a prop')) return
    59‚Üí  origError.apply(console, args)
    60‚Üí}
    61‚Üíconsole.error = suppress
    62‚Üíconsole.warn = suppress
    63‚Üí
    64‚Üí// ‚îÄ‚îÄ markdown-to-jsx custom rules (ported from web app, render stubs) ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
    65‚Üí
    66‚Üíconst INLINE_SKIP_R =
    67‚Üí  '((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\\\\1|[\\s\\S])+?)'
    68‚Üí
    69‚Üífunction simpleInlineRegex(regex: RegExp) {
    70‚Üí  const fn: any = (source: string, state: any) => {
    71‚Üí    if (state.inline || state.simple) return regex.exec(source)
    72‚Üí    return null
    73‚Üí  }
    74‚Üí  fn.inline = 1
    75‚Üí  return fn
    76‚Üí}
    77‚Üí
    78‚Üífunction blockRegex(regex: RegExp) {
    79‚Üí  return (source: string, state: any) => {
    80‚Üí    if (state.inline || state.simple) return null
    81‚Üí    return regex.exec(source)
    82‚Üí  }
    83‚Üí}
    84‚Üí
    85‚Üífunction allowInline(fn: any) {
    86‚Üí  fn.inline = 1
    87‚Üí  return fn
    88‚Üí}
    89‚Üí
    90‚Üífunction parseCaptureInline(capture: any, parse: any, state: any = {}) {
    91‚Üí  const isCurrentlyInline = state.inline || false
    92‚Üí  const isCurrentlySimple = state.simple || false
    93‚Üí  state.inline = true
    94‚Üí  state.simple = true
    95‚Üí  const result = parse(capture[2], state)
    96‚Üí  state.inline = isCurrentlyInline
    97‚Üí  state.simple = isCurrentlySimple
    98‚Üí  return { children: result }
    99‚Üí}
   100‚Üí
   101‚Üíconst SpoilerRule = {
   102‚Üí  match: simpleInlineRegex(
   103‚Üí    new RegExp(
   104‚Üí      `^(\\|\\|)((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|\`.*?\`|\\\\\\1|\\|\\|.*?\\|\\||[\\s\\S])+?)\\1`,
   105‚Üí    ),
   106‚Üí  ),
   107‚Üí  order: Priority.LOW,
   108‚Üí  parse: parseCaptureInline,
   109‚Üí  render(node: any, output: any, state: any) {
   110‚Üí    return createElement(
   111‚Üí      'span',
   112‚Üí      { key: state?.key, className: 'spoiler' },
   113‚Üí      output(node.children, state),
   114‚Üí    )
   115‚Üí  },
   116‚Üí}
   117‚Üí
   118‚Üíconst MentionRule = {
   119‚Üí  match: allowInline((source: string) => {
   120‚Üí    return /^(\[(?<displayName>.*?)\])?\{((?<prefix>(GH)|(TW)|(TG))@(?<name>\w+\b))\}\s?(?!\[.*?\])/.exec(
   121‚Üí      source,
   122‚Üí    )
   123‚Üí  }),
   124‚Üí  order: Priority.LOW,
   125‚Üí  parse(capture: any) {
   126‚Üí    return { content: { ...capture.groups } }
   127‚Üí  },
   128‚Üí  render(result: any, _: any, state: any) {
   129‚Üí    const { prefix, name, displayName } = result.content || {}
   130‚Üí    if (!name) return null
   131‚Üí    return createElement(
   132‚Üí      'span',
   133‚Üí      { key: state?.key, className: 'mention' },
   134‚Üí      `@${displayName || name}`,
   135‚Üí    )
   136‚Üí  },
   137‚Üí}
   138‚Üí
   139‚Üíconst InsertRule = {
   140‚Üí  match: simpleInlineRegex(new RegExp(`^(\\+\\+)${INLINE_SKIP_R}\\1`)),
   141‚Üí  order: Priority.MED,
   142‚Üí  parse: parseCaptureInline,
   143‚Üí  render(node: any, output: any, state: any) {
   144‚Üí    return createElement(
   145‚Üí      'ins',
   146‚Üí      { key: state?.key },
   147‚Üí      output(node.children, state),
   148‚Üí    )
   149‚Üí  },
   150‚Üí}
   151‚Üí
   152‚Üíconst KateXRule = {
   153‚Üí  match: simpleInlineRegex(new RegExp(`^(\\$)(${INLINE_SKIP_R})\\1`)),
   154‚Üí  order: Priority.LOW,
   155‚Üí  parse(capture: any) {
   156‚Üí    return { type: 'kateX', katex: capture[2] }
   157‚Üí  },
   158‚Üí  render(node: any, _: any, state: any) {
   159‚Üí    return createElement(
   160‚Üí      'span',
   161‚Üí      { key: state?.key, className: 'katex-inline' },
   162‚Üí      node.katex,
   163‚Üí    )
   164‚Üí  },
   165‚Üí}
   166‚Üí
   167‚Üíconst KateXBlockRule = {
   168‚Üí  match: blockRegex(
   169‚Üí    new RegExp(`^\\s*\\$\\$ *(?<content>[\\s\\S]+?)\\s*\\$\\$ *(?:\n *)+\n?`),
   170‚Üí  ),
   171‚Üí  order: Priority.MED,
   172‚Üí  parse(capture: any) {
   173‚Üí    return { type: 'kateXBlock', groups: capture.groups }
   174‚Üí  },
   175‚Üí  render(node: any, _: any, state: any) {
   176‚Üí    if (!node.groups) return null
   177‚Üí    return createElement(
   178‚Üí      'div',
   179‚Üí      { key: state?.key, className: 'katex-block' },
   180‚Üí      node.groups.content,
   181‚Üí    )
   182‚Üí  },
   183‚Üí}
   184‚Üí
   185‚Üíconst shouldCatchContainerName = [
   186‚Üí  'gallery',
   187‚Üí  'banner',
   188‚Üí  'carousel',
   189‚Üí  'warn',
   190‚Üí  'error',
   191‚Üí  'danger',
   192‚Üí  'info',
   193‚Üí  'success',
   194‚Üí  'warning',
   195‚Üí  'note',
   196‚Üí  'grid',
   197‚Üí  'masonry',
   198‚Üí].join('|')
   199‚Üí
   200‚Üíconst ContainerRule = {
   201‚Üí  match: (source: string) => {
   202‚Üí    const result =
   203‚Üí      /^\s*::: *(?<type>.*?) *(?:\{(?<params>.*?)\} *)?\n(?<content>[\s\S]+?)\s*::: *(?:\n *)+/.exec(
   204‚Üí        source,
   205‚Üí      )
   206‚Üí    if (!result) return null
   207‚Üí    const { type } = result.groups!
   208‚Üí    if (!type || !type.match(shouldCatchContainerName)) return null
   209‚Üí    return result
   210‚Üí  },
   211‚Üí  order: Priority.MED,
   212‚Üí  parse(capture: any) {
   213‚Üí    return { node: { ...(capture.groups as any) } }
   214‚Üí  },
   215‚Üí  render(node: any, _: any, state: any) {
   216‚Üí    const { type, content } = node.node
   217‚Üí    return createElement(
   218‚Üí      'div',
   219‚Üí      { key: state?.key, className: `container-${type}` },
   220‚Üí      content,
   221‚Üí    )
   222‚Üí  },
   223‚Üí}
   224‚Üí
   225‚Üí// ‚îÄ‚îÄ Compile markdown-to-jsx with matching parser rules ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
   226‚Üí
   227‚Üífunction compileMarkdown(md: string): any {
   228‚Üí  return compiler(md, {
   229‚Üí    wrapper: null,
   230‚Üí    doNotProcessHtmlElements: ['tab', 'style', 'script'] as any[],
   231‚Üí    overrides: {
   232‚Üí      video: (props: any) =>
   233‚Üí        createElement('video', { ...props, key: props.key }),
   234‚Üí      LinkCard: (props: any) =>
   235‚Üí        createElement('div', { key: props.key, className: 'link-card' }),
   236‚Üí      Gallery: (props: any) =>
   237‚Üí        createElement('div', { key: props.key, className: 'gallery' }),
   238‚Üí      Tabs: (props: any) =>
   239‚Üí        createElement(
   240‚Üí          'div',
   241‚Üí          { key: props.key, className: 'tabs' },
   242‚Üí          props.children,
   243‚Üí        ),
   244‚Üí      tab: (props: any) =>
   245‚Üí        createElement(
   246‚Üí          'div',
   247‚Üí          { key: props.key, className: 'tab' },
   248‚Üí          props.children,
   249‚Üí        ),
   250‚Üí      tag: (props: any) =>
   251‚Üí        createElement(
   252‚Üí          'span',
   253‚Üí          { key: props.key, className: 'tag' },
   254‚Üí          props.children,
   255‚Üí        ),
   256‚Üí    },
   257‚Üí    extendsRules: {
   258‚Üí      spoilder: SpoilerRule,
   259‚Üí      mention: MentionRule,
   260‚Üí      ins: InsertRule,
   261‚Üí      kateX: KateXRule,
   262‚Üí      kateXBlock: KateXBlockRule,
   263‚Üí      container: ContainerRule,
   264‚Üí    },
   265‚Üí  } as any)
   266‚Üí}
   267‚Üí
   268‚Üífunction renderMarkdownToString(md: string): string {
   269‚Üí  const elements = compileMarkdown(md)
   270‚Üí  return renderToString(createElement('div', null, elements))
   271‚Üí}
   272‚Üí
   273‚Üí// ‚îÄ‚îÄ RichRenderer wrapper ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
   274‚Üí
   275‚Üífunction renderRichToString(data: any): string {
   276‚Üí  return renderToString(
   277‚Üí    createElement(RichRenderer, {
   278‚Üí      value: data,
   279‚Üí      variant: 'article',
   280‚Üí      theme: 'light',
   281‚Üí    }),
   282‚Üí  )
   283‚Üí}
   284‚Üí
   285‚Üí// ‚îÄ‚îÄ Benchmark runner ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
   286‚Üí
   287‚Üífunction bench(
   288‚Üí  label: string,
   289‚Üí  fn: () => string,
   290‚Üí): { times: number[]; htmlSize: number } {
   291‚Üí  // warmup
   292‚Üí  for (let i = 0; i < WARMUP; i++) fn()
   293‚Üí
   294‚Üí  const times: number[] = []
   295‚Üí  let htmlSize = 0
   296‚Üí  for (let i = 0; i < ITERATIONS; i++) {
   297‚Üí    const start = performance.now()
   298‚Üí    const html = fn()
   299‚Üí    times.push(performance.now() - start)
   300‚Üí    if (i === 0) htmlSize = Buffer.byteLength(html, 'utf-8')
   301‚Üí  }
   302‚Üí  return { times, htmlSize }
   303‚Üí}

   305‚Üí// ‚îÄ‚îÄ Main ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ

   308‚Üíconst testingMd = readFileSync(join(__dirname, '../md/testing.md'), 'utf-8')

   317‚Üí// ‚îÄ‚îÄ Part 1: All presets with RichRenderer ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ
   318‚Üí
   319‚Üíconsole.log('‚ïê'.repeat(90))

   322‚Üí

   370‚Üí  mdResult.htmlSize,
   371‚Üí)
   372‚Üí
   373‚Üíconsole.log()
   374‚Üíconsole.log('‚îÄ'.repeat(90))
   375‚Üí
   376‚Üíconst richMed = median(richResult.times)
   377‚Üíconst mdMed = median(mdResult.times)
   378‚Üíconst ratio = mdMed / richMed
   379‚Üí
   380‚Üíconsole.log(`  Comparison (median):`)
   381‚Üíconsole.log(`    RichRenderer:    ${fmt(richMed)}`)
   382‚Üíconsole.log(`    markdown-to-jsx: ${fmt(mdMed)}`)
   383‚Üíif (ratio > 1) {
   384‚Üí  console.log(`    ‚Üí RichRenderer is ${ratio.toFixed(1)}x faster`)
   385‚Üí} else {
   386‚Üí  console.log(`    ‚Üí markdown-to-jsx is ${(1 / ratio).toFixed(1)}x faster`)
   387‚Üí}
   388‚Üíconsole.log()
   389‚Üí

```text
     1‚Üí'use client'
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport type { SpringOptions } from 'motion/react'
     4‚Üíimport { animateValue } from 'motion/react'
     5‚Üí
     6‚Üíconst spring: SpringOptions = {
     7‚Üí  stiffness: 1000,
     8‚Üí  damping: 250,
     9‚Üí}
    10‚Üí// TODO scroller lock
    11‚Üíexport const springScrollTo = (y: number) => {
    12‚Üí  const scrollTop =
    13‚Üí    // FIXME latest version framer will ignore keyframes value `0`
    14‚Üí    document.documentElement.scrollTop || document.body.scrollTop
    15‚Üí
    16‚Üí  const stopSpringScrollHandler = () => {
    17‚Üí    animation.stop()
    18‚Üí  }
    19‚Üí  const animation = animateValue({
    20‚Üí    keyframes: [scrollTop + 1, y],
    21‚Üí    autoplay: true,
    22‚Üí    ...spring,
    23‚Üí    type: 'spring',
    24‚Üí    onPlay() {
    25‚Üí      window.addEventListener('wheel', stopSpringScrollHandler)
    26‚Üí      window.addEventListener('touchmove', stopSpringScrollHandler)
    27‚Üí    },
    28‚Üí
    29‚Üí    onUpdate(latest) {
    30‚Üí      if (latest <= 0) {
    31‚Üí        animation.stop()
    32‚Üí      }
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí      window.scrollTo(0, latest)
    35‚Üí    },
    36‚Üí  })
    37‚Üí
    38‚Üí  animation.then(() => {
    39‚Üí    window.removeEventListener('wheel', stopSpringScrollHandler)
    40‚Üí    window.removeEventListener('touchmove', stopSpringScrollHandler)
    41‚Üí  })
    42‚Üí  return animation
    43‚Üí}
    44‚Üí
    45‚Üíexport const springScrollToTop = () => springScrollTo(0)
    46‚Üí
    47‚Üíexport const springScrollToElement = (element: HTMLElement, delta = 40) => {
    48‚Üí  const y = calculateElementTop(element)
    49‚Üí
    50‚Üí  const to = y + delta
    51‚Üí  return springScrollTo(to)
    52‚Üí}
    53‚Üí
    54‚Üíconst calculateElementTop = (el: HTMLElement) => {
    55‚Üí  let top = 0
    56‚Üí  while (el) {
    57‚Üí    top += el.offsetTop
    58‚Üí    el = el.offsetParent as HTMLElement
    59‚Üí  }
    60‚Üí  return top
    61‚Üí}
    62‚Üí
```

```text
     1‚Üí'use client'
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport { useTranslations } from 'next-intl'
     4‚Üíimport { startTransition, useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     5‚Üí
     6‚Üíimport { FABPortable } from '~/components/ui/fab'
     7‚Üíimport { useModalStack } from '~/components/ui/modal'
     8‚Üíimport { MAIN_CONTENT_ID } from '~/constants/dom-id'
     9‚Üíimport { DOMCustomEvents } from '~/constants/event'
    10‚Üíimport { useForceUpdate } from '~/hooks/common/use-force-update'
    11‚Üí
    12‚Üíimport { useTocHeadingStrategy } from './TocHeadingStrategy'
    13‚Üíimport { TocTree } from './TocTree'
    14‚Üí
    15‚Üíexport const TocFAB = () => {
    16‚Üí  const t = useTranslations('common')
    17‚Üí  const { present } = useModalStack()
    18‚Üí  const [forceUpdate, updated] = useForceUpdate()
    19‚Üí  const [$headings, setHeadings] = useState<HTMLHeadingElement[]>()
    20‚Üí
    21‚Üí  useEffect(() => {
    22‚Üí    const handler = () => {
    23‚Üí      startTransition(() => {
    24‚Üí        forceUpdate()
    25‚Üí      })
    26‚Üí    }
    27‚Üí    document.addEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    28‚Üí    return () => {
    29‚Üí      document.removeEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    30‚Üí    }
    31‚Üí  }, [forceUpdate])
    32‚Üí
    33‚Üí  const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
    34‚Üí  useEffect(() => {
    35‚Üí    const $mainContentRender = document.getElementById(MAIN_CONTENT_ID)
    36‚Üí    if (!$mainContentRender) {
    37‚Üí      setHeadings(undefined)
    38‚Üí      return
    39‚Üí    }
    40‚Üí
    41‚Üí    setHeadings(queryHeadings($mainContentRender))
    42‚Üí  }, [queryHeadings, updated])
    43‚Üí  const presentToc = useCallback(() => {
    44‚Üí    present({
    45‚Üí      title: t('toc_title'),
    46‚Üí      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
    47‚Üí      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
    48‚Üí        <TocTree
    49‚Üí          $headings={$headings!}
    50‚Üí          className="max-h-full space-y-3 overflow-y-auto [&>li]:py-1"
    51‚Üí          onItemClick={() => {
    52‚Üí            dismiss()
    53‚Üí          }}
    54‚Üí          scrollInNextTick
    55‚Üí        />
    56‚Üí      ),
    57‚Üí    })
    58‚Üí  }, [$headings, present, t])
    59‚Üí
    60‚Üí  if (!$headings?.length) return null
    61‚Üí
    62‚Üí  return (
    63‚Üí    <FABPortable aria-label={t('aria_toc')} onClick={presentToc}>
    64‚Üí      <i className="i-mingcute-list-expansion-line" />
    65‚Üí    </FABPortable>
    66‚Üí  )
    67‚Üí}
    68‚Üí
```

     1‚Üíimport {
     2‚Üí  codeSnippetNodes,
     3‚Üí  embedNodes,
     4‚Üí  enhancedRendererConfig,
     5‚Üí  galleryNodes,
     6‚Üí  TldrawNode,

     8‚Üíimport type { RichRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-static-renderer'
     9‚Üíimport { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-static-renderer'
    10‚Üíimport type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
    11‚Üíimport { useMemo } from 'react'
    12‚Üí
    13‚Üíconst defaultExtraNodes = [
    14‚Üí  TldrawNode,
    15‚Üí  ...embedNodes,
    16‚Üí  ...galleryNodes,
    17‚Üí  ...codeSnippetNodes,
    18‚Üí]
    19‚Üí
    20‚Üíexport interface ShiroRendererProps extends Omit<
    21‚Üí  RichRendererProps,
    22‚Üí  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes'
    23‚Üí> {
    24‚Üí  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
    25‚Üí}
    26‚Üí
    27‚Üíexport function ShiroRenderer({ extraNodes, ...props }: ShiroRendererProps) {
    28‚Üí  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    29‚Üí    () =>
    30‚Üí      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    31‚Üí    [extraNodes],
    32‚Üí  )
    33‚Üí
    34‚Üí  return (
    35‚Üí    <RichRenderer
    36‚Üí      {...props}
    37‚Üí      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
    38‚Üí      rendererConfig={enhancedRendererConfig}
    39‚Üí    />
    40‚Üí  )
    41‚Üí}
    42‚Üí

    29‚Üí  accessory?: React.ReactNode | React.FC
    30‚Üí
    31‚Üí  as?: React.ElementType
    32‚Üí}
    33‚Üíexport interface TocAsideRef {
    34‚Üí  getContainer: () => HTMLUListElement | null
    35‚Üí}
    36‚Üíexport const TocAside = ({
    37‚Üí  ref,
    38‚Üí  className,
    39‚Üí  children,
    40‚Üí  treeClassName,
    41‚Üí  accessory,
    42‚Üí  as: As = 'aside',
    43‚Üí}: TocAsideProps &
    44‚Üí  TocSharedProps &
    45‚Üí  ComponentType & { ref?: React.RefObject<TocAsideRef | null> }) => {
    46‚Üí  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLUListElement>(null)
    47‚Üí  const $article = useWrappedElement()
    48‚Üí  const isImmersive = useIsImmersiveReadingEnabled()
    49‚Üí
    50‚Üí  const [forceUpdate, updated] = useForceUpdate()
    51‚Üí
    52‚Üí  useEffect(() => {
    53‚Üí    const handler = () => {
    54‚Üí      startTransition(() => {
    55‚Üí        forceUpdate()
    56‚Üí      })
    57‚Üí    }
    58‚Üí    document.addEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    59‚Üí    return () => {
    60‚Üí      document.removeEventListener(DOMCustomEvents.RefreshToc, handler)
    61‚Üí    }
    62‚Üí  }, [])
    63‚Üí
    64‚Üí  useImperativeHandle(ref, () => ({
    65‚Üí    getContainer: () => containerRef.current,
    66‚Üí  }))
    67‚Üí
    68‚Üí  if ($article === undefined) {
    69‚Üí    throw new TypeError('<Toc /> must be used in <WrappedElementProvider />')
    70‚Üí  }
    71‚Üí  const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
    72‚Üí  const $headings = useMemo(() => {
    73‚Üí    if (!$article) {
    74‚Üí      return []
    75‚Üí    }
    76‚Üí    return queryHeadings($article)
    77‚Üí  }, [$article, updated, queryHeadings])
    78‚Üí
    79‚Üí  useEffect(() => {
    80‚Üí    const setMaxWidth = throttle(() => {
    81‚Üí      if (containerRef.current) {
    82‚Üí        containerRef.current.style.maxWidth = `${
    83‚Üí          window.innerWidth -
    84‚Üí          containerRef.current.getBoundingClientRect().x -
    85‚Üí          30
    86‚Üí        }px`
    87‚Üí      }
    88‚Üí    }, 14)
    89‚Üí    setMaxWidth()
    90‚Üí
    91‚Üí    window.addEventListener('resize', setMaxWidth)
    92‚Üí    return () => {
    93‚Üí      window.removeEventListener('resize', setMaxWidth)
    94‚Üí    }
    95‚Üí  }, [])
    96‚Üí
    97‚Üí  return (
    98‚Üí    <m.aside
    99‚Üí      className={clsxm('st-toc z-[3]', 'relative font-sans', className)}
   100‚Üí      animate={{
   101‚Üí        opacity: isImmersive ? 0.2 : 1,
   102‚Üí      }}
   103‚Üí      transition={Spring.presets.smooth}
   104‚Üí      style={{
   105‚Üí        pointerEvents: isImmersive ? 'none' : 'auto',
   106‚Üí      }}
   107‚Üí    >
   108‚Üí      <TocTree
   109‚Üí        $headings={$headings}
   110‚Üí        containerRef={containerRef}
   111‚Üí        className={clsxm('absolute max-h-[75vh]', treeClassName)}
   112‚Üí        accessory={accessory}
   113‚Üí      />
   114‚Üí      {children}
   115‚Üí    </m.aside>
   116‚Üí  )
   117‚Üí}
   118‚ÜíTocAside.displayName = 'TocAside'
   119‚Üí
```

```text
     1‚Üí'use client'
     2‚Üí
     3‚Üíimport clsx from 'clsx'
     4‚Üíimport { atom, useAtom } from 'jotai'
     5‚Üíimport { m } from 'motion/react'
     6‚Üíimport type { FC } from 'react'
     7‚Üíimport * as React from 'react'
     8‚Üíimport {
     9‚Üí  memo,
    10‚Üí  startTransition,
    11‚Üí  useCallback,
    12‚Üí  useEffect,
    13‚Üí  useMemo,
    14‚Üí  useRef,
    15‚Üí} from 'react'
    16‚Üí
    17‚Üíimport { Divider } from '~/components/ui/divider'
    18‚Üíimport { RightToLeftTransitionView } from '~/components/ui/transition'
    19‚Üíimport { useStateToRef } from '~/hooks/common/use-state-ref'
    20‚Üíimport { useContainerCanScroll } from '~/hooks/shared/use-mask-scrollarea'
    21‚Üíimport { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    22‚Üíimport { springScrollToElement } from '~/lib/scroller'
    23‚Üí
    24‚Üíimport type { TocSharedProps } from './TocAside'
    25‚Üíimport type { ITocItem } from './TocItem'
    26‚Üíimport { TocItem } from './TocItem'
    27‚Üí
    28‚Üíconst tocActiveIdAtom = atom<string | null>(null)
    29‚Üí
    30‚Üífunction useActiveId($headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]) {
    31‚Üí  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useAtom(tocActiveIdAtom)
    32‚Üí  useEffect(() => {
    33‚Üí    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    34‚Üí      (entries) => {
    35‚Üí        entries.forEach((entry) => {
    36‚Üí          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
    37‚Üí            startTransition(() => {
    38‚Üí              setActiveId(entry.target.id)
    39‚Üí            })
    40‚Üí          }
    41‚Üí        })
    42‚Üí      },
    43‚Üí      { rootMargin: `-100px 0px -100px 0px` },
    44‚Üí    )
    45‚Üí    $headings.forEach(($heading) => {
    46‚Üí      observer.observe($heading)
    47‚Üí    })
    48‚Üí    return () => {
    49‚Üí      observer.disconnect()
    50‚Üí    }
    51‚Üí  }, [$headings])
    52‚Üí
    53‚Üí  return [activeId, setActiveId] as const
    54‚Üí}
    55‚Üí
    56‚Üíexport const TocTree: Component<
    57‚Üí  {
    58‚Üí    $headings: HTMLHeadingElement[]
    59‚Üí    containerRef?: React.MutableRefObject<HTMLUListElement | null>
    60‚Üí    /**
    61‚Üí     * ‰∏ãÊ¨°Âæ™ÁéØ‰∏≠Ë∑≥ËΩ¨ÔºåÂú® Modal ‰∏≠ÂæàÁÆ°Áî®
    62‚Üí     */
    63‚Üí    scrollInNextTick?: boolean
    64‚Üí
    65‚Üí    onItemClick?: (item: ITocItem) => void
    66‚Üí  } & TocSharedProps
    67‚Üí> = ({
    68‚Üí  $headings,
    69‚Üí  containerRef,
    70‚Üí  className,
    71‚Üí  accessory,
    72‚Üí  scrollInNextTick,
    73‚Üí  onItemClick,
    74‚Üí}) => {
    75‚Üí  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useActiveId($headings)
    76‚Üí
    77‚Üí  const toc: ITocItem[] = useMemo(
    78‚Üí    () =>
    79‚Üí      Array.from($headings).map((el, idx) => {
    80‚Üí        const depth = +el.tagName.slice(1)
    81‚Üí        const elClone = el.cloneNode(true) as HTMLElement
    82‚Üí        elClone.querySelectorAll('del, .katex-container').forEach((del) => {
    83‚Üí          del.remove()
    84‚Üí        })
    85‚Üí
    86‚Üí        const title = elClone.textContent || ''
    87‚Üí
    88‚Üí        const index = idx
    89‚Üí
    90‚Üí        return {
    91‚Üí          depth,
    92‚Üí          index: Number.isNaN(index) ? -1 : index,
    93‚Üí          title,
    94‚Üí          anchorId: el.id,
    95‚Üí          $heading: el,
    96‚Üí        }
    97‚Üí      }),
    98‚Üí    [$headings],
    99‚Üí  )
   100‚Üí
   101‚Üí  const rootDepth = useMemo(
   102‚Üí    () =>
   103‚Üí      toc?.length
   104‚Üí        ? (toc.reduce(
   105‚Üí            (d: number, cur) => Math.min(d, cur.depth),
   106‚Üí            toc[0]?.depth || 0,
   107‚Üí          ) as any as number)
   108‚Üí        : 0,
   109‚Üí    [toc],
   110‚Üí  )
   111‚Üí
   112‚Üí  const tocRef = useStateToRef(toc)
   113‚Üí  const handleScrollTo = useCallback(
   114‚Üí    (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => {
   115‚Üí      onItemClick?.(tocRef.current[i])
   116‚Üí
   117‚Üí      if ($el) {
   118‚Üí        const handle = () => {
   119‚Üí          springScrollToElement($el, -100).then(() => {
   120‚Üí            setActiveId?.(anchorId)
   121‚Üí          })
   122‚Üí        }
   123‚Üí        if (scrollInNextTick) {
   124‚Üí          requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   125‚Üí            handle()
   126‚Üí          })
   127‚Üí        } else handle()
   128‚Üí      }
   129‚Üí    },
   130‚Üí    [],
   131‚Üí  )
   132‚Üí  const accessoryElement = useMemo(() => {
   133‚Üí    if (!accessory) return null
   134‚Üí    return React.isValidElement(accessory)
   135‚Üí      ? accessory
   136‚Üí      : React.createElement(accessory as FC)
   137‚Üí  }, [accessory])
   138‚Üí  const treeRef = useRef<HTMLUListElement>(null)
   139‚Üí  const [, canScroll] = useContainerCanScroll({ ref: treeRef })
   140‚Üí  return (
   141‚Üí    <ul
   142‚Üí      className={clsxm(
   143‚Üí        'scrollbar-none flex grow flex-col scroll-smooth px-2',
   144‚Üí        className,
   145‚Üí      )}
   146‚Üí      ref={containerRef}
   147‚Üí    >
   148‚Üí      <ul
   149‚Üí        ref={treeRef}
   150‚Üí        className={clsx(
   151‚Üí          'scrollbar-none overflow-auto',
   152‚Üí          canScroll && 'mask-scroller',
   153‚Üí        )}
   154‚Üí      >
   155‚Üí        {toc?.map((heading) => (
   156‚Üí          <MemoedItem
   157‚Üí            heading={heading}
   158‚Üí            isActive={heading.anchorId === activeId}
   159‚Üí            key={`${heading.title}-${heading.index}`}
   160‚Üí            rootDepth={rootDepth}
   161‚Üí            onClick={handleScrollTo}
   162‚Üí          />
   163‚Üí        ))}
   164‚Üí      </ul>
   165‚Üí      {accessoryElement && (
   166‚Üí        <li className="shrink-0">
   167‚Üí          {toc.length > 0 && <Divider />}
   168‚Üí          {accessoryElement}
   169‚Üí        </li>
   170‚Üí      )}
   171‚Üí    </ul>
   172‚Üí  )
   173‚Üí}
   174‚Üíconst MemoedItem = memo<{
   175‚Üí  isActive: boolean
   176‚Üí  heading: ITocItem
   177‚Üí  rootDepth: number
   178‚Üí  onClick?: (i: number, $el: HTMLElement | null, anchorId: string) => void
   179‚Üí}>((props) => {
   180‚Üí  const {
   181‚Üí    heading,
   182‚Üí    isActive,
   183‚Üí    onClick,
   184‚Üí    rootDepth,
   185‚Üí    // containerRef
   186‚Üí  } = props
   187‚Üí
   188‚Üí  const itemRef = useRef<HTMLElement>(null)
   189‚Üí
   190‚Üí  useEffect(() => {
   191‚Üí    if (!isActive) return
   192‚Üí
   193‚Üí    const $item = itemRef.current
   194‚Üí    if (!$item) return
   195‚Üí    const $container = $item.parentElement
   196‚Üí    if (!$container) return
   197‚Üí
   198‚Üí    // ÊääÂΩìÂâç active Item ÊªöÂä®Âà∞ÂÆπÂô®ÁöÑ‰∏≠Èó¥
   199‚Üí    const containerHeight = $container.clientHeight
   200‚Üí    const itemHeight = $item.clientHeight
   201‚Üí    const itemOffsetTop = $item.offsetTop
   202‚Üí    const { scrollTop } = $container
   203‚Üí
   204‚Üí    const itemTop = itemOffsetTop - scrollTop
   205‚Üí    const itemBottom = itemTop + itemHeight
   206‚Üí    if (itemTop < 0 || itemBottom > containerHeight) {
   207‚Üí      $container.scrollTop =
   208‚Üí        itemOffsetTop - containerHeight / 2 + itemHeight / 2
   209‚Üí    }
   210‚Üí  }, [isActive])
   211‚Üí
   212‚Üí  return (
   213‚Üí    <RightToLeftTransitionView
   214‚Üí      timeout={
   215‚Üí        useRef({
   216‚Üí          exit: 50,
   217‚Üí          enter: 50 * heading.index,
   218‚Üí        }).current
   219‚Üí      }
   220‚Üí      key={heading.title}
   221‚Üí      as="li"
   222‚Üí      className="relative leading-none"
   223‚Üí      ref={itemRef}
   224‚Üí    >
   225‚Üí      {isActive && (
   226‚Üí        <m.span
   227‚Üí          layoutId="active-toc-item"
   228‚Üí          layout
   229‚Üí          className="absolute inset-y-[3px] left-0 w-[2px] rounded-xs bg-accent"
   230‚Üí        />
   231‚Üí      )}
   232‚Üí      <TocItem
   233‚Üí        heading={heading}
   234‚Üí        onClick={onClick}
   235‚Üí        active={isActive}
   236‚Üí        key={heading.title}
   237‚Üí        rootDepth={rootDepth}
   238‚Üí      />
   239‚Üí    </RightToLeftTransitionView>
   240‚Üí  )
   241‚Üí})
   242‚ÜíMemoedItem.displayName = 'MemoedItem'
   243‚Üí
```

     1‚Üíimport {
     2‚Üí  allNodes,
     3‚Üí  ColorSchemeProvider,
     4‚Üí  editorTheme,
     5‚Üí  FootnoteDefinitionsProvider,
     6‚Üí  getVariantClass,
     7‚Üí  NestedContentRendererProvider,
     8‚Üí  RendererConfigProvider,
     9‚Üí} from '@haklex/rich-editor/static'
    10‚Üíimport { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
    11‚Üíimport { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
    12‚Üíimport type { LexicalEditor, SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
    13‚Üíimport { $getRoot } from 'lexical'
    14‚Üíimport {
    15‚Üí  cloneElement,
    16‚Üí  createElement,
    17‚Üí  isValidElement,
    18‚Üí  type ReactNode,
    19‚Üí} from 'react'
    20‚Üí
    21‚Üíimport { renderBuiltinNode } from './engine/renderBuiltinNode'
    22‚Üíimport { renderTextNode } from './engine/renderTextNode'
    23‚Üíimport { preprocessFootnotes } from './preprocess/footnote'
    24‚Üíimport type { RichRendererProps } from './types'
    25‚Üí
    26‚Üíinterface EditorConfig {
    27‚Üí  namespace: string
    28‚Üí  theme: Record<string, any>
    29‚Üí}
    30‚Üí
    31‚Üífunction wrapDecoration(
    32‚Üí  serialized: any,
    33‚Üí  key: string,
    34‚Üí  decoration: ReactNode,
    35‚Üí): ReactNode {
    36‚Üí  switch (serialized.type) {
    37‚Üí    case 'alert-quote':
    38‚Üí      return createElement(
    39‚Üí        'div',
    40‚Üí        { key, className: `rich-alert rich-alert-${serialized.alertType}` },
    41‚Üí        decoration,
    42‚Üí      )
    43‚Üí    case 'banner':
    44‚Üí      return createElement(
    45‚Üí        'div',
    46‚Üí        { key, className: `rich-banner rich-banner-${serialized.bannerType}` },
    47‚Üí        decoration,
    48‚Üí      )
    49‚Üí    case 'grid-container':
    50‚Üí      return createElement(
    51‚Üí        'div',
    52‚Üí        { key, className: 'rich-grid-container' },
    53‚Üí        decoration,
    54‚Üí      )
    55‚Üí    default:
    56‚Üí      if (isValidElement(decoration)) {
    57‚Üí        return cloneElement(decoration, { key })
    58‚Üí      }
    59‚Üí      return decoration
    60‚Üí  }
    61‚Üí}
    62‚Üí
    63‚Üífunction applyBlockId(
    64‚Üí  element: ReactNode,
    65‚Üí  blockId: string | undefined,
    66‚Üí  nodeKey: string,
    67‚Üí): ReactNode {
    68‚Üí  if (!blockId) return element
    69‚Üí
    70‚Üí  if (isValidElement(element) && typeof element.type === 'string') {
    71‚Üí    return cloneElement(element as any, { 'data-block-id': blockId } as any)
    72‚Üí  }
    73‚Üí
    74‚Üí  return (
    75‚Üí    <div
    76‚Üí      key={`${nodeKey}-block-anchor`}
    77‚Üí      className="rich-block-anchor"
    78‚Üí      data-block-id={blockId}
    79‚Üí    >
    80‚Üí      {element}
    81‚Üí    </div>
    82‚Üí  )
    83‚Üí}
    84‚Üí
    85‚Üífunction renderTree(
    86‚Üí  node: any,
    87‚Üí  editor: LexicalEditor,
    88‚Üí  editorConfig: EditorConfig,
    89‚Üí  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    90‚Üí  key: string,
    91‚Üí  blockId?: string,
    92‚Üí): ReactNode {
    93‚Üí  const nodeKey = node.getKey ? node.getKey() : key
    94‚Üí
    95‚Üí  if (typeof node.decorate === 'function') {
    96‚Üí    try {
    97‚Üí      const decoration = node.decorate(editor, editorConfig)
    98‚Üí      if (decoration != null) {
    99‚Üí        const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}
   100‚Üí        return applyBlockId(
   101‚Üí          wrapDecoration(serialized, nodeKey, decoration),
   102‚Üí          blockId,
   103‚Üí          nodeKey,
   104‚Üí        )
   105‚Üí      }
   106‚Üí    } catch {
   107‚Üí      /* fallthrough to builtin */
   108‚Üí    }
   109‚Üí  }
   110‚Üí
   111‚Üí  const serialized = node.exportJSON ? node.exportJSON() : {}
   112‚Üí
   113‚Üí  if (serialized.type === 'text') {
   114‚Üí    return renderTextNode(serialized, nodeKey)
   115‚Üí  }
   116‚Üí
   117‚Üí  let children: ReactNode[] | null = null
   118‚Üí  if (node.getChildren) {
   119‚Üí    const childNodes = node.getChildren()
   120‚Üí    if (childNodes.length > 0) {
   121‚Üí      children = childNodes.map((child: any, i: number) =>
   122‚Üí        renderTree(
   123‚Üí          child,
   124‚Üí          editor,
   125‚Üí          editorConfig,
   126‚Üí          headingSlugs,
   127‚Üí          `${nodeKey}-${i}`,
   128‚Üí        ),
   129‚Üí      )
   130‚Üí    }
   131‚Üí  }
   132‚Üí
   133‚Üí  return applyBlockId(
   134‚Üí    renderBuiltinNode(serialized, nodeKey, children, headingSlugs),
   135‚Üí    blockId,
   136‚Üí    nodeKey,
   137‚Üí  )
   138‚Üí}
   139‚Üí
   140‚Üífunction renderEditorToReact(
   141‚Üí  value: SerializedEditorState,
   142‚Üí  nodes: any[],
   143‚Üí): {
   144‚Üí  content: ReactNode
   145‚Üí  footnoteData: ReturnType<typeof preprocessFootnotes>
   146‚Üí  renderNestedContent: (state: SerializedEditorState) => ReactNode
   147‚Üí} {
   148‚Üí  const editor = createHeadlessEditor({
   149‚Üí    nodes,
   150‚Üí    theme: editorTheme,
   151‚Üí    editable: false,
   152‚Üí    onError: (error: Error) => {
   153‚Üí      console.error('[RichRenderer]', error)
   154‚Üí    },
   155‚Üí  })
   156‚Üí
   157‚Üí  const editorConfig: EditorConfig = { namespace: 'ssr', theme: editorTheme }
   158‚Üí
   159‚Üí  const editorState = editor.parseEditorState(value)
   160‚Üí  editor.setEditorState(editorState)
   161‚Üí
   162‚Üí  const footnoteData = preprocessFootnotes(value)
   163‚Üí
   164‚Üí  const rawRootChildren = (value as any).root?.children as any[] | undefined
   165‚Üí
   166‚Üí  let content: ReactNode = null
   167‚Üí  editorState.read(() => {
   168‚Üí    const root = $getRoot()
   169‚Üí    const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
   170‚Üí    const children = root
   171‚Üí      .getChildren()
   172‚Üí      .map((child: any, i: number) =>
   173‚Üí        renderTree(
   174‚Üí          child,
   175‚Üí          editor,
   176‚Üí          editorConfig,
   177‚Üí          headingSlugs,
   178‚Üí          `ssr-${i}`,
   179‚Üí          rawRootChildren?.[i]?.$?.blockId,
   180‚Üí        ),
   181‚Üí      )
   182‚Üí    content = <>{children}</>
   183‚Üí  })
   184‚Üí
   185‚Üí  const renderNestedContent = (state: SerializedEditorState): ReactNode => {
   186‚Üí    const nestedEditor = createHeadlessEditor({
   187‚Üí      nodes,
   188‚Üí      theme: editorTheme,
   189‚Üí      editable: false,
   190‚Üí      onError: (error: Error) => {
   191‚Üí        console.error('[RichRenderer:nested]', error)
   192‚Üí      },
   193‚Üí    })
   194‚Üí    const nestedEditorConfig: EditorConfig = {
   195‚Üí      namespace: 'ssr-nested',
   196‚Üí      theme: editorTheme,
   197‚Üí    }
   198‚Üí    const nestedState = nestedEditor.parseEditorState(state)
   199‚Üí    nestedEditor.setEditorState(nestedState)
   200‚Üí    let nested: ReactNode = null
   201‚Üí    const nestedRawChildren = (state as any).root?.children as any[] | undefined
   202‚Üí    nestedState.read(() => {
   203‚Üí      const root = $getRoot()
   204‚Üí      const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
   205‚Üí      const ch = root
   206‚Üí        .getChildren()
   207‚Üí        .map((child: any, i: number) =>
   208‚Üí          renderTree(
   209‚Üí            child,
   210‚Üí            nestedEditor,
   211‚Üí            nestedEditorConfig,
   212‚Üí            headingSlugs,
   213‚Üí            `nested-${i}`,
   214‚Üí            nestedRawChildren?.[i]?.$?.blockId,
   215‚Üí          ),
   216‚Üí        )
   217‚Üí      nested = <>{ch}</>
   218‚Üí    })
   219‚Üí    return nested
   220‚Üí  }
   221‚Üí
   222‚Üí  return { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent }
   223‚Üí}
   224‚Üí
   225‚Üíexport function RichRenderer({
   226‚Üí  value,
   227‚Üí  variant = 'article',
   228‚Üí  theme = 'light',
   229‚Üí  className,
   230‚Üí  style,
   231‚Üí  as: Component = 'div',
   232‚Üí  rendererConfig,
   233‚Üí  extraNodes,
   234‚Üí}: RichRendererProps) {
   235‚Üí  const variantClass = getVariantClass(variant)
   236‚Üí  const nodes = extraNodes ? [...allNodes, ...extraNodes] : allNodes
   237‚Üí
   238‚Üí  const { content, footnoteData, renderNestedContent } = renderEditorToReact(
   239‚Üí    value,
   240‚Üí    nodes,
   241‚Üí  )
   242‚Üí
   243‚Üí  const classes = ['rich-content', variantClass, className]
   244‚Üí    .filter(Boolean)
   245‚Üí    .join(' ')
   246‚Üí
   247‚Üí  return (
   248‚Üí    <PortalThemeProvider className={variantClass} theme={theme}>
   249‚Üí      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
   250‚Üí        <RendererConfigProvider
   251‚Üí          config={rendererConfig}
   252‚Üí          mode="renderer"
   253‚Üí          variant={variant}
   254‚Üí        >
   255‚Üí          <FootnoteDefinitionsProvider
   256‚Üí            definitions={footnoteData.definitions}
   257‚Üí            displayNumberMap={footnoteData.displayNumberMap}
   258‚Üí          >
   259‚Üí            <NestedContentRendererProvider value={renderNestedContent}>
   260‚Üí              <Component
   261‚Üí                className={classes}
   262‚Üí                style={style}
   263‚Üí                data-theme={theme}
   264‚Üí                suppressHydrationWarning
   265‚Üí              >
   266‚Üí                {content}
   267‚Üí              </Component>
   268‚Üí            </NestedContentRendererProvider>
   269‚Üí          </FootnoteDefinitionsProvider>
   270‚Üí        </RendererConfigProvider>
   271‚Üí      </ColorSchemeProvider>
   272‚Üí    </PortalThemeProvider>
   273‚Üí  )
   274‚Üí}
   275‚Üí
```
