     9‚Üí
    10‚Üífunction textToSlug(text: string): string {
    11‚Üí  return text
    12‚Üí    .toLowerCase()
    13‚Üí    .trim()
    14‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    15‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    16‚Üí    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    17‚Üí}
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üífunction extractText(node: any): string {
    20‚Üí  if (node.text) return node.text
    21‚Üí  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
    22‚Üí  return ''
    23‚Üí}
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üíexport function renderBuiltinNode(
    26‚Üí  node: any,
    27‚Üí  key: string,
    28‚Üí  children: ReactNode[] | null,
    29‚Üí  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    30‚Üí): ReactNode {
    31‚Üí  switch (node.type) {
    32‚Üí    case 'root':
    33‚Üí      return <>{children}</>
    34‚Üí    case 'paragraph': {
    35‚Üí      const align = node.format
    36‚Üí        ? ({ textAlign: node.format } as const)
    37‚Üí        : undefined
    38‚Üí      return (
    39‚Üí        <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>
    40‚Üí          {children}
    41‚Üí        </p>
    42‚Üí      )
    43‚Üí    }
    44‚Üí    case 'heading': {
    45‚Üí      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    46‚Üí      const text = extractText(node)
    47‚Üí      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    48‚Üí      let slug = baseSlug
    49‚Üí      if (baseSlug) {
    50‚Üí        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    51‚Üí        if (count !== undefined) {
    52‚Üí          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    53‚Üí          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    54‚Üí        } else {
    55‚Üí          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    56‚Üí        }
    57‚Üí      }
    58‚Üí      return (
    59‚Üí        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    60‚Üí          {slug && (
    61‚Üí            <a
    62‚Üí              className="rich-heading-anchor"
    63‚Üí              aria-hidden="true"
    64‚Üí              tabIndex={-1}
    65‚Üí              href={`#${slug}`}
    66‚Üí            />
    67‚Üí          )}
    68‚Üí          {children}
    69‚Üí        </Tag>
    70‚Üí      )
    71‚Üí    }
    72‚Üí    case 'quote':
    73‚Üí      return (
    74‚Üí        <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">
    75‚Üí          {children}
    76‚Üí        </blockquote>
    77‚Üí      )
    78‚Üí    case 'list': {
    79‚Üí      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'
    80‚Üí      const cls =

    83‚Üí          : node.listType === 'check'

    85‚Üí            : 'rich-list-ul'
    86‚Üí      return (

    89‚Üí          className={cls}
    90‚Üí          start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}
    91‚Üí        >
    92‚Üí          {children}
    93‚Üí        </Tag>
    94‚Üí      )
    95‚Üí    }
    96‚Üí    case 'listitem': {
    97‚Üí      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
    98‚Üí      const hasNestedList = node.children?.some((c: any) => c.type === 'list')
    99‚Üí      let cls: string
   100‚Üí      if (hasNestedList) {

     7‚Üíinterface HeadingProps {
     8‚Üí  id: string

    14‚Üíexport const createMarkdownHeadingComponent = () => {
    15‚Üí  let index = 0
    16‚Üí  return (props: HeadingProps) => {
    17‚Üí    const ref = useRef<boolean | number>(false)
    18‚Üí    const memoizedIndex = useMemo(() => {
    19‚Üí      if (typeof ref.current === 'number') {
    20‚Üí        return ref.current
    21‚Üí      }
    22‚Üí      ref.current = index++
    23‚Üí      return ref.current
    24‚Üí    }, [])
    25‚Üí    return <MHeader index={memoizedIndex} {...props} />
    26‚Üí  }
    27‚Üí}
    28‚Üí
    29‚Üíconst MHeader = (
    30‚Üí  props: HeadingProps & {
    31‚Üí    index: number
    32‚Üí  },
    33‚Üí) => {
    34‚Üí  const { children, id, level, index } = props
    35‚Üí
    36‚Üí  const isClient = useIsClient()
    37‚Üí
    38‚Üí  const nextId = `${index}__${id}`
    39‚Üí  return createElement<DOMAttributes<HTMLHeadingElement>, HTMLHeadingElement>(
    40‚Üí    `h${level}`,
    41‚Üí    {
    42‚Üí      id: nextId,
    43‚Üí      className: 'group flex items-center',
    44‚Üí
    45‚Üí      'data-markdown-heading': true,
    46‚Üí    } as any,
    47‚Üí    null,
    48‚Üí    <>
    49‚Üí      <span>{children}</span>
    50‚Üí      {isClient && (
    51‚Üí        <a
    52‚Üí          className="center ml-2 inline-flex cursor-pointer select-none text-accent opacity-0 transition-opacity duration-200 group-hover:opacity-100"
    53‚Üí          role="button"
    54‚Üí          href={`#${nextId}`}
    55‚Üí          tabIndex={0}
    56‚Üí          aria-hidden
    57‚Üí          onClick={(e) => {
    58‚Üí            const { state } = history
    59‚Üí            history.replaceState(state, '', `#${nextId}`)
    60‚Üí            springScrollToElement(document.getElementById(nextId)!, -100)

    55‚Üí  value?: string
    56‚Üí
    57‚Üí  style?: React.CSSProperties
    58‚Üí  readonly renderers?: Partial<MarkdownToJSX.PartialRules>
    59‚Üí  wrapperProps?: React.DetailedHTMLProps<
    60‚Üí    React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>,
    61‚Üí    HTMLDivElement
    62‚Üí  >
    63‚Üí  wrapperRef?: React.Ref<HTMLElement>
    64‚Üí  codeBlockFully?: boolean
    65‚Üí  className?: string
    66‚Üí  as?: React.ElementType
    67‚Üí
    68‚Üí  allowsScript?: boolean
    69‚Üí
    70‚Üí  removeWrapper?: boolean
    71‚Üí
    72‚Üí  variant?: MarkdownVariant
    73‚Üí}
    74‚Üí
    75‚Üíconst debugValue = isDev
    76‚Üí  ? ''
    77‚Üí  : //       '```component shadow with-styles\n' +
    78‚Üí    //         `import=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@innei/react-cdn-components@0.0.33/dist/components/ShadowDOMTest.js
    79‚Üí    // name=MDX.ShadowDOMTest
    80‚Üí    // height=4 05` +
    81‚Üí    //         '\n' +
    82‚Üí    //         '```',
    83‚Üí    //     ].join('')
    84‚Üí    null
    85‚Üí
    86‚Üíexport const Markdown: FC<MdProps & MarkdownToJSX.Options & PropsWithChildren> =
    87‚Üí  memo((props) => {
    88‚Üí    const {
    89‚Üí      value,
    90‚Üí      renderers,
    91‚Üí      style,
    92‚Üí      wrapperProps = {},
    93‚Üí      wrapperRef,
    94‚Üí      codeBlockFully = false,
    95‚Üí      className,
    96‚Üí      overrides,
    97‚Üí      extendsRules,
    98‚Üí
    99‚Üí      as: As = 'div',
   100‚Üí      allowsScript = false,
   101‚Üí      removeWrapper = false,
   102‚Üí      variant = 'post',
   103‚Üí
   104‚Üí      ...rest
   105‚Üí    } = props
   106‚Üí
   107‚Üí    const MHeader = useMemo(() => createMarkdownHeadingComponent(), [])
   108‚Üí
   109‚Üí    const node = useMemo(() => {
   110‚Üí      const mdContent = debugValue || value || props.children
   111‚Üí
   112‚Üí      if (!mdContent) return null
   113‚Üí      if (typeof mdContent != 'string') return null
   114‚Üí
   115‚Üí      const mdElement = compiler(mdContent, {
   116‚Üí        slugify,
   117‚Üí        doNotProcessHtmlElements: ['tab', 'style', 'script'] as any[],
   118‚Üí        wrapper: null,
   119‚Üí
   120‚Üí        overrides: {
   121‚Üí          p: MParagraph,
   122‚Üí
   123‚Üí          thead: MTableHead,
   124‚Üí          tr: MTableRow,
   125‚Üí          tbody: MTableBody,
   126‚Üí          td: MTableTd,
   127‚Üí          th: MTableTh,
   128‚Üí          table: MTable,
   129‚Üí          // FIXME: footer tag in raw html will renders not as expected, but footer tag in this markdown lib will wrapper as linkReferer footnotes
   130‚Üí          footer: MFootNote,
   131‚Üí          details: MDetails,
   132‚Üí          img: MarkdownImage,
   133‚Üí          tag: MTag,
   134‚Üí
   135‚Üí          Tabs,
   136‚Üí
   137‚Üí          tab: Tab,
   138‚Üí          video: Video,
   139‚Üí
   140‚Üí          // for custom react component
   141‚Üí          // Tag: MTag,
   142‚Üí
   143‚Üí          LinkCard,
   144‚Üí          Gallery,
   145‚Üí          script: allowsScript ? Script : undefined!,
   146‚Üí
   147‚Üí          ...overrides,
   148‚Üí        },
   149‚Üí
   150‚Üí        overrideRules: {
   151‚Üí          [RuleType.heading]: {
   152‚Üí            render(node, output, state) {
   153‚Üí              return (
   154‚Üí                <MHeader id={node.id} level={node.level} key={state?.key}>
   155‚Üí                  {output(node.children, state!)}
   156‚Üí                </MHeader>
   157‚Üí              )
   158‚Üí            },
   159‚Üí          },
   160‚Üí          [RuleType.textMarked]: {
   161‚Üí            render(node, output, state) {
   162‚Üí              return (
   163‚Üí                <mark key={state?.key} className="rounded-md">
   164‚Üí                  <span className="px-1">{output(node.children, state!)}</span>
   165‚Üí                </mark>
   166‚Üí              )
   167‚Üí            },
   168‚Üí          },
   169‚Üí          [RuleType.gfmTask]: {
   170‚Üí            render(node, _, state) {
   171‚Üí              return (
   172‚Üí                <input
   173‚Üí                  type="checkbox"
   174‚Üí                  key={state?.key}
   175‚Üí                  checked={node.completed}
   176‚Üí                  readOnly
   177‚Üí                  className="size-[1em]!"
   178‚Üí                />
   179‚Üí              )
   180‚Üí            },
   181‚Üí          },
   182‚Üí
   183‚Üí          [RuleType.link]: {
   184‚Üí            render(node, output, state) {
   185‚Üí              const { target, title } = node
   186‚Üí
   187‚Üí              let realText = ''
   188‚Üí
   189‚Üí              for (const child of node.children) {
   190‚Üí                if (child.type === RuleType.text) {
   191‚Üí                  realText += child.text
   192‚Üí                }
   193‚Üí              }
   194‚Üí
   195‚Üí              return (
   196‚Üí                <MarkdownLink
   197‚Üí                  href={sanitizer(target)!}
   198‚Üí                  title={title}
   199‚Üí                  key={state?.key}
   200‚Üí                  text={realText}
   201‚Üí                >
   202‚Üí                  {output(node.children, state!)}
   203‚Üí                </MarkdownLink>
   204‚Üí              )
   205‚Üí            },
   206‚Üí          },
   207‚Üí
   208‚Üí          [RuleType.blockQuote]: {
   209‚Üí            render(node, output, state) {
   210‚Üí              return (
   211‚Üí                <MBlockQuote key={state?.key} alert={node.alert}>
   212‚Üí                  {output(node.children, state!)}
   213‚Üí                </MBlockQuote>
   214‚Üí              )
   215‚Üí            },
   216‚Üí          },
   217‚Üí
   218‚Üí          [RuleType.footnoteReference]: {
   219‚Üí            render(node, output, state) {
   220‚Üí              const { footnoteMap, text } = node
   221‚Üí              const footnote = footnoteMap.get(text)
   222‚Üí              const linkCardId = (() => {
   223‚Üí                try {
   224‚Üí                  const thisUrl = new URL(
   225‚Üí                    footnote?.footnote?.replace(': ', '') ?? '',
   226‚Üí                  )
   227‚Üí                  const isCurrentHost =
   228‚Üí                    thisUrl.hostname === window.location.hostname
   229‚Üí                  if (!isCurrentHost && !isDev) {
   230‚Üí                    return
   231‚Üí                  }
   232‚Üí                  const { pathname } = thisUrl
   233‚Üí                  return pathname.slice(1)
   234‚Üí                } catch {
   235‚Üí                  return
   236‚Üí                }
   237‚Üí              })()
   238‚Üí
   239‚Üí              return (
   240‚Üí                <Fragment key={state?.key}>
   241‚Üí                  <FloatPopover
   242‚Üí                    wrapperClassName="inline"
   243‚Üí                    as="span"
   244‚Üí                    triggerElement={
   245‚Üí                      <a
   246‚Üí                        href={`${getFootNoteDomId(text)}`}
   247‚Üí                        onClick={(e) => {
   248‚Üí                          e.preventDefault()
   249‚Üí                          const id = getFootNoteDomId(text)
   250‚Üí                          springScrollToElement(
   251‚Üí                            document.getElementById(id)!,
   252‚Üí                            -window.innerHeight / 2,
   253‚Üí                          )
   254‚Üí                          redHighlight(id)
   255‚Üí                        }}
   256‚Üí                      >
   257‚Üí                        <sup
   258‚Üí                          id={`${getFootNoteRefDomId(text)}`}
   259‚Üí                        >{`[^${text}]`}</sup>
   260‚Üí                      </a>
   261‚Üí                    }
   262‚Üí                    type="tooltip"
   263‚Üí                  >
   264‚Üí                    {footnote?.footnote?.slice(1)}
   265‚Üí                  </FloatPopover>
   266‚Üí                  {linkCardId && (
   267‚Üí                    <LinkCard
   268‚Üí                      id={linkCardId}
   269‚Üí                      source={LinkCardSource.MixSpace}
   270‚Üí                    />
   271‚Üí                  )}
   272‚Üí                </Fragment>
   273‚Üí              )
   274‚Üí            },
   275‚Üí          },
   276‚Üí
   277‚Üí          [RuleType.codeBlock]: {
   278‚Üí            render(node, output, state) {
   279‚Üí              return (
   280‚Üí                <CodeBlockRender
   281‚Üí                  key={state?.key}
   282‚Üí                  content={node.text}
   283‚Üí                  lang={node.lang}
   284‚Üí                  attrs={node?.rawAttrs}
   285‚Üí                />
   286‚Üí              )
   287‚Üí            },
   288‚Üí          },
   289‚Üí          [RuleType.codeInline]: {
   290‚Üí            render(node, output, state) {
   291‚Üí              return (
   292‚Üí                <code
   293‚Üí                  key={state?.key}
   294‚Üí                  className="rounded-md bg-zinc-200 px-2 font-mono dark:bg-neutral-800"
   295‚Üí                >
   296‚Üí                  {node.text}
   297‚Üí                </code>
   298‚Üí              )
   299‚Üí            },
   300‚Üí          },
   301‚Üí
   302‚Üí          [RuleType.orderedList]: listRule as any,
   303‚Üí          [RuleType.unorderedList]: listRule as any,
   304‚Üí
   305‚Üí          ...renderers,
   306‚Üí        },
   307‚Üí        extendsRules: {
   308‚Üí          spoilder: SpoilerRule,
   309‚Üí          mention: MentionRule,
   310‚Üí
   311‚Üí          ins: InsertRule,
   312‚Üí          kateX: KateXRule,
   313‚Üí          kateXBlock: KateXBlockRule,
   314‚Üí          container: ContainerRule,
   315‚Üí          ...extendsRules,
   316‚Üí        },
   317‚Üí        ...rest,
   318‚Üí      })
   319‚Üí
   320‚Üí      return mdElement
   321‚Üí    }, [
   322‚Üí      value,
   323‚Üí      props.children,
   324‚Üí      allowsScript,
   325‚Üí      overrides,
   326‚Üí      extendsRules,
   327‚Üí      renderers,
   328‚Üí      rest,
   329‚Üí      MHeader,
   330‚Üí    ])
   331‚Üí
   332‚Üí    if (removeWrapper) return <Suspense>{node}</Suspense>
   333‚Üí
   334‚Üí    return (
   335‚Üí      <ErrorBoundary>
   336‚Üí        <Suspense>
   337‚Üí          <As
   338‚Üí            style={style}
   339‚Üí            {...wrapperProps}
   340‚Üí            ref={wrapperRef as any}
   341‚Üí            className={clsx(
   342‚Üí              'markdown',
   343‚Üí              codeBlockFully ? 'markdown--code-fully' : undefined,
   344‚Üí              variant !== 'post' && `markdown--${variant}`,
   345‚Üí              className,
   346‚Üí            )}
   347‚Üí          >
   348‚Üí            {node}
   349‚Üí          </As>
   350‚Üí        </Suspense>
   351‚Üí      </ErrorBoundary>
   352‚Üí    )
   353‚Üí  })
   354‚ÜíMarkdown.displayName = 'Markdown'
   355‚Üí
   356‚Üíexport const MainMarkdown: FC<
   357‚Üí  MdProps & MarkdownToJSX.Options & PropsWithChildren
   358‚Üí> = (props) => {
   359‚Üí  const { wrapperProps = noopObj } = props
   360‚Üí  const setMainMarkdownRef = useCallback((element: HTMLElement | null) => {
   361‚Üí    setMainMarkdownElement(element)
   362‚Üí  }, [])
   363‚Üí
   364‚Üí  return (
   365‚Üí    <Markdown
   366‚Üí      as="main"
   367‚Üí      {...props}
   368‚Üí      wrapperRef={setMainMarkdownRef}
   369‚Üí      wrapperProps={useMemo(
   370‚Üí        () => ({
   371‚Üí          ...wrapperProps,
   372‚Üí          id: MAIN_CONTENT_ID,
   373‚Üí        }),
   374‚Üí        [wrapperProps],
   375‚Üí      )}
   376‚Üí    />
   377‚Üí  )
   378‚Üí}
   379‚Üí
   380‚Üí// not complete, but probably good enough
   381‚Üífunction slugify(str: string) {
   382‚Üí  return (
   383‚Üí    str
   384‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[√Ä√Å√Ç√É√Ñ√Ö√¶]/gi, 'a')
   385‚Üí      .replaceAll(/√ß/gi, 'c')
   386‚Üí      .replaceAll(/√∞/gi, 'd')
   387‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[√à√â√ä√ã]/gi, 'e')
   388‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[√è√é√ç√å]/gi, 'i')
   389‚Üí      .replaceAll(/√ë/gi, 'n')
   390‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[√∏≈ì√ï√î√ì√í]/gi, 'o')
   391‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[√ú√õ√ö√ô]/gi, 'u')
   392‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[≈∏√ù]/gi, 'y')
   393‚Üí      // remove non-chinese, non-latin, non-number, non-space
   394‚Üí      .replaceAll(
   395‚Üí        /[^\u4E00-\u9FFF\u3040-\u309F\u30A0-\u30FF\uAC00-\uD7AFa-z0-9- ]/gi,
   396‚Üí        '',
   397‚Üí      )
   398‚Üí      .replaceAll(' ', '-')
   399‚Üí      .toLowerCase()
   400‚Üí  )
   401‚Üí}
   402‚Üí
   403‚Üíconst listRule: Partial<
   404‚Üí  MarkdownToJSX.Rule<
   405‚Üí    MarkdownToJSX.OrderedListNode | MarkdownToJSX.UnorderedListNode
   406‚Üí  >
   407‚Üí> = {
   408‚Üí  render(node, output, state) {
   409‚Üí    const Tag = node.ordered ? 'ol' : 'ul'
   410‚Üí
   411‚Üí    return (
   412‚Üí      <Tag
   413‚Üí        key={state?.key}
   414‚Üí        start={node.type === RuleType.orderedList ? node.start : undefined}
   415‚Üí      >
   416‚Üí        {node.items.map((item: any, i: number) => {
   417‚Üí          let className = ''
   418‚Üí          if (item[0]?.type === 'gfmTask') {
   419‚Üí            className = 'list-none flex items-center'
   420‚Üí          }
   421‚Üí
   422‚Üí          return (
   423‚Üí            <li className={className} key={i}>
   424‚Üí              {output(item, state!)}
   425‚Üí            </li>
   426‚Üí          )
   427‚Üí        })}
   428‚Üí      </Tag>
   429‚Üí    )
   430‚Üí  },
   431‚Üí}
   432‚Üí
```

     1‚Üíexport function textToSlug(text: string): string {
     2‚Üí  return text
     3‚Üí    .toLowerCase()
     4‚Üí    .trim()
     5‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
     6‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
     7‚Üí    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
     8‚Üí}
     9‚Üí
```

   103‚Üíconst headingSelector = `:is(.rich-heading-h1, .rich-heading-h2, .rich-heading-h3, .rich-heading-h4, .rich-heading-h5, .rich-heading-h6)`

   299‚ÜíglobalStyle(

   312‚Üí// Checkbox box
   313‚ÜíglobalStyle(
   314‚Üí  `${richContent} .rich-list-item.rich-list-item-unchecked::before, ${richContent} .rich-list-item.rich-list-item-checked::before`,
   315‚Üí  {

   322‚Üí    border: `2px solid color-mix(in oklab, ${vars.color.textSecondary} 60%, transparent)`,

   339‚Üí  },

   341‚Üí
   342‚Üí// Checkmark (clip-path animation, rotated to form check shape)
   343‚ÜíglobalStyle(
   344‚Üí  `${richContent} .rich-list-item.rich-list-item-unchecked::after, ${richContent} .rich-list-item.rich-list-item-checked::after`,
   345‚Üí  {
   346‚Üí    content: '""',
   347‚Üí    position: 'absolute',

   349‚Üí    top: 'calc((1lh - var(--rc-cb-size)) / 2)',
   350‚Üí    width: 'var(--rc-cb-size)',
   351‚Üí    height: 'var(--rc-cb-size)',
   352‚Üí    opacity: 0,
   353‚Üí    clipPath: 'polygon(20% 100%, 20% 80%, 50% 80%, 50% 80%, 70% 80%, 70% 100%)',
   354‚Üí    backgroundColor: 'white',
   355‚Üí    boxSizing: 'border-box',
   356‚Üí    display: 'block',
   357‚Üí    pointerEvents: 'none',
   358‚Üí    transform: 'rotate(45deg)',
   359‚Üí    transformOrigin: 'center',
   360‚Üí    transition:
   361‚Üí      'clip-path 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), opacity 0.15s',
   362‚Üí  },
   363‚Üí)
   364‚Üí
   365‚Üí// Checked state: box
   366‚ÜíglobalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-list-item.rich-list-item-checked::before`, {

   371‚Üí

   373‚ÜíglobalStyle(`${richContent} .rich-list-item.rich-list-item-checked::after`, {

 `./packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin.tsx`

```text
     1‚Üíimport { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2‚Üíimport { HeadingNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
     3‚Üíimport { useEffect } from 'react'
     4‚Üí
     5‚Üífunction textToSlug(text: string): string {
     6‚Üí  return (
     7‚Üí    text
     8‚Üí      .toLowerCase()
     9‚Üí      .trim()
    10‚Üí      // eslint-disable-next-line regexp/no-dupe-characters-character-class
    11‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    12‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    13‚Üí      .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    14‚Üí  )
    15‚Üí}
    16‚Üí
    17‚Üífunction deduplicateSlug(slug: string, usedSlugs: Map<string, number>): string {
    18‚Üí  const count = usedSlugs.get(slug)
    19‚Üí  if (count === undefined) {
    20‚Üí    usedSlugs.set(slug, 1)
    21‚Üí    return slug
    22‚Üí  }
    23‚Üí  usedSlugs.set(slug, count + 1)
    24‚Üí  return `${slug}-${count}`
    25‚Üí}
    26‚Üí
    27‚Üíexport function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
    28‚Üí  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    29‚Üí
    30‚Üí  useEffect(() => {
    31‚Üí    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    32‚Üí
    33‚Üí    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
    34‚Üí      usedSlugs.clear()
    35‚Üí
    36‚Üí      for (const [nodeKey, mutation] of mutations) {
    37‚Üí        if (mutation === 'destroyed') continue
    38‚Üí
    39‚Üí        const dom = editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)
    40‚Üí        if (!dom) continue
    41‚Üí
    42‚Üí        const text = dom.textContent || ''
    43‚Üí        const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    44‚Üí        if (!baseSlug) continue
    45‚Üí
    46‚Üí        const slug = deduplicateSlug(baseSlug, usedSlugs)
    47‚Üí        dom.id = slug
    48‚Üí
    49‚Üí        let anchor = dom.querySelector<HTMLAnchorElement>(
    50‚Üí          '.rich-heading-anchor',
    51‚Üí        )
    52‚Üí        if (!anchor) {
    53‚Üí          anchor = document.createElement('a')
    54‚Üí          anchor.className = 'rich-heading-anchor'
    55‚Üí          anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true')
    56‚Üí          anchor.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1')
    57‚Üí          dom.prepend(anchor)
    58‚Üí        }
    59‚Üí        anchor.href = `#${slug}`
    60‚Üí      }
    61‚Üí    })
    62‚Üí  }, [editor])
    63‚Üí
    64‚Üí  return null
    65‚Üí}
    66‚Üí
```
</details></tool-use>

     9‚Üí

    13‚Üí    .trim()
    14‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')

    18‚Üí
    19‚Üífunction extractText(node: any): string {
    20‚Üí  if (node.text) return node.text
    21‚Üí  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
    22‚Üí  return ''
    23‚Üí}
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üíexport function renderBuiltinNode(
    26‚Üí  node: any,
    27‚Üí  key: string,
    28‚Üí  children: ReactNode[] | null,
    29‚Üí  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    30‚Üí): ReactNode {
    31‚Üí  switch (node.type) {
    32‚Üí    case 'root':
    33‚Üí      return <>{children}</>
    34‚Üí    case 'paragraph': {
    35‚Üí      const align = node.format
    36‚Üí        ? ({ textAlign: node.format } as const)
    37‚Üí        : undefined
    38‚Üí      return (
    39‚Üí        <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>
    40‚Üí          {children}
    41‚Üí        </p>
    42‚Üí      )
    43‚Üí    }
    44‚Üí    case 'heading': {
    45‚Üí      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    46‚Üí      const text = extractText(node)
    47‚Üí      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    48‚Üí      let slug = baseSlug
    49‚Üí      if (baseSlug) {
    50‚Üí        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    51‚Üí        if (count !== undefined) {
    52‚Üí          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    53‚Üí          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    54‚Üí        } else {
    55‚Üí          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    56‚Üí        }
    57‚Üí      }
    58‚Üí      return (
    59‚Üí        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    60‚Üí          {slug && (
    61‚Üí            <a
    62‚Üí              className="rich-heading-anchor"
    63‚Üí              aria-hidden="true"
    64‚Üí              tabIndex={-1}
    65‚Üí              href={`#${slug}`}
    66‚Üí            />
    67‚Üí          )}
    68‚Üí          {children}
    69‚Üí        </Tag>
    70‚Üí      )
    71‚Üí    }
    72‚Üí    case 'quote':
    73‚Üí      return (
    74‚Üí        <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">
    75‚Üí          {children}
    76‚Üí        </blockquote>
    77‚Üí      )
    78‚Üí    case 'list': {
    79‚Üí      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'
    80‚Üí      const cls =
    81‚Üí        node.listType === 'number'
    82‚Üí          ? 'rich-list-ol'
    83‚Üí          : node.listType === 'check'
    84‚Üí            ? 'rich-checklist rich-list-ul'
    85‚Üí            : 'rich-list-ul'
    86‚Üí      return (
    87‚Üí        <Tag
    88‚Üí          key={key}
    89‚Üí          className={cls}
    90‚Üí          start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}
    91‚Üí        >
    92‚Üí          {children}
    93‚Üí        </Tag>
    94‚Üí      )
    95‚Üí    }
    96‚Üí    case 'listitem': {
    97‚Üí      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
    98‚Üí      const hasNestedList = node.children?.some((c: any) => c.type === 'list')
    99‚Üí      let cls: string
   100‚Üí      if (hasNestedList) {
   101‚Üí        cls = 'rich-list-nested-item'
   102‚Üí      } else if (isChecklist) {
   103‚Üí        cls = node.checked
   104‚Üí          ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked'
   105‚Üí          : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked'
   106‚Üí      } else {
   107‚Üí        cls = 'rich-list-item'
   108‚Üí      }
   109‚Üí      return (
   110‚Üí        <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>
   111‚Üí          {children}
   112‚Üí        </li>
   113‚Üí      )
   114‚Üí    }
   115‚Üí    case 'link':
   116‚Üí      return (
   117‚Üí        <a
   118‚Üí          key={key}
   119‚Üí          className="rich-link"
   120‚Üí          href={node.url}
   121‚Üí          target={node.target || '_blank'}
   122‚Üí          rel={node.rel || 'noopener'}
   123‚Üí        >
   124‚Üí          <LinkFavicon href={node.url} />
   125‚Üí          {children}
   126‚Üí        </a>
   127‚Üí      )
   128‚Üí    case 'autolink':
   129‚Üí      return (
   130‚Üí        <a
   131‚Üí          key={key}
   132‚Üí          className="rich-link"
   133‚Üí          href={node.url}
   134‚Üí          target="_blank"
   135‚Üí          rel="noopener"
   136‚Üí        >
   137‚Üí          <LinkFavicon href={node.url} />
   138‚Üí          {children}
   139‚Üí        </a>
   140‚Üí      )
   141‚Üí    case 'horizontalrule':
   142‚Üí      return <hr key={key} className="rich-hr" />
   143‚Üí    case 'table':
   144‚Üí      return (
   145‚Üí        <div key={key} className={tableStyles.tableWrapper}>
   146‚Üí          <table className={tableStyles.table}>{children}</table>
   147‚Üí        </div>
   148‚Üí      )
   149‚Üí    case 'tablerow':
   150‚Üí      return <tr key={key}>{children}</tr>
   151‚Üí    case 'tablecell': {
   152‚Üí      const CellTag = node.headerState ? 'th' : 'td'
   153‚Üí      const cls = node.headerState
   154‚Üí        ? tableStyles.tableHead
   155‚Üí        : tableStyles.tableCell
   156‚Üí      return (
   157‚Üí        <CellTag
   158‚Üí          key={key}
   159‚Üí          className={cls}
   160‚Üí          colSpan={node.colSpan > 1 ? node.colSpan : undefined}
   161‚Üí        >
   162‚Üí          {children}
   163‚Üí        </CellTag>
   164‚Üí      )
   165‚Üí    }
   166‚Üí    case 'details': {
   167‚Üí      const summary = node.summary || ''
   168‚Üí      return (
   169‚Üí        <details
   170‚Üí          key={key}
   171‚Üí          className="rich-details"
   172‚Üí          open={node.open || undefined}
   173‚Üí        >
   174‚Üí          <summary className="rich-details-summary">
   175‚Üí            <span className="rich-details-summary-text">{summary}</span>
   176‚Üí            <span className="rich-details-chevron">
   177‚Üí              <svg
   178‚Üí                width="20"
   179‚Üí                height="20"
   180‚Üí                viewBox="0 0 20 20"
   181‚Üí                fill="none"
   182‚Üí                stroke="currentColor"
   183‚Üí                strokeWidth="1.5"
   184‚Üí                strokeLinecap="round"
   185‚Üí                strokeLinejoin="round"
   186‚Üí              >
   187‚Üí                <path d="M6 8L10 12L14 8" />
   188‚Üí              </svg>
   189‚Üí            </span>
   190‚Üí          </summary>
   191‚Üí          <div className="rich-details-content">{children}</div>
   192‚Üí        </details>
   193‚Üí      )
   194‚Üí    }
   195‚Üí    case 'spoiler':
   196‚Üí      return (
   197‚Üí        <span key={key} className="rich-spoiler" role="button" tabIndex={0}>
   198‚Üí          {children}
   199‚Üí        </span>
   200‚Üí      )
   201‚Üí    case 'ruby':
   202‚Üí      return createElement(RendererWrapper as any, {
   203‚Üí        key,
   204‚Üí        rendererKey: 'Ruby',
   205‚Üí        defaultRenderer: RubyRenderer,
   206‚Üí        props: {
   207‚Üí          reading: node.reading ?? '',
   208‚Üí          children,
   209‚Üí        },
   210‚Üí      })
   211‚Üí    case 'code':
   212‚Üí      return (
   213‚Üí        <pre key={key} className="rich-code-block">
   214‚Üí          <code>{children}</code>
   215‚Üí        </pre>
   216‚Üí      )
   217‚Üí    case 'code-highlight':
   218‚Üí      return <span key={key}>{node.text}</span>
   219‚Üí    case 'linebreak':
   220‚Üí      return <br key={key} />
   221‚Üí    case 'tab':
   222‚Üí      return <span key={key}>{'  '}</span>
   223‚Üí    default:
   224‚Üí      return null
   225‚Üí  }
   226‚Üí}
   227‚Üí
```

```text
     1‚Üíimport { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2‚Üíimport { HeadingNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
     3‚Üíimport { useEffect } from 'react'
     4‚Üí
     5‚Üífunction textToSlug(text: string): string {
     6‚Üí  return (
     7‚Üí    text
     8‚Üí      .toLowerCase()
     9‚Üí      .trim()
    10‚Üí      // eslint-disable-next-line regexp/no-dupe-characters-character-class
    11‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3000-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    12‚Üí      .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    13‚Üí      .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    14‚Üí  )
    15‚Üí}
    16‚Üí
    17‚Üífunction deduplicateSlug(slug: string, usedSlugs: Map<string, number>): string {
    18‚Üí  const count = usedSlugs.get(slug)
    19‚Üí  if (count === undefined) {
    20‚Üí    usedSlugs.set(slug, 1)
    21‚Üí    return slug
    22‚Üí  }
    23‚Üí  usedSlugs.set(slug, count + 1)
    24‚Üí  return `${slug}-${count}`
    25‚Üí}
    26‚Üí
    27‚Üíexport function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
    28‚Üí  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    29‚Üí
    30‚Üí  useEffect(() => {
    31‚Üí    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    32‚Üí
    33‚Üí    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
    34‚Üí      usedSlugs.clear()
    35‚Üí
    36‚Üí      for (const [nodeKey, mutation] of mutations) {
    37‚Üí        if (mutation === 'destroyed') continue
    38‚Üí
    39‚Üí        const dom = editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)
    40‚Üí        if (!dom) continue
    41‚Üí
    42‚Üí        const text = dom.textContent || ''
    43‚Üí        const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    44‚Üí        if (!baseSlug) continue
    45‚Üí
    46‚Üí        const slug = deduplicateSlug(baseSlug, usedSlugs)
    47‚Üí        dom.id = slug
    48‚Üí
    49‚Üí        let anchor = dom.querySelector<HTMLAnchorElement>(
    50‚Üí          '.rich-heading-anchor',
    51‚Üí        )
    52‚Üí        if (!anchor) {
    53‚Üí          anchor = document.createElement('a')
    54‚Üí          anchor.className = 'rich-heading-anchor'
    55‚Üí          anchor.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true')
    56‚Üí          anchor.setAttribute('tabindex', '-1')
    57‚Üí          dom.prepend(anchor)
    58‚Üí        }
    59‚Üí        anchor.href = `#${slug}`
    60‚Üí      }
    61‚Üí    })
    62‚Üí  }, [editor])
    63‚Üí
    64‚Üí  return null
    65‚Üí}
    66‚Üí
```

### **2. HEADING RENDERING (DETAILED)**

Located in `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx` (lines 44-70):

**Current heading implementation:**
- **Case statement**: `case 'heading':`
- **Heading tag selection**: Reads `node.tag` as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
- **Text extraction**: Uses `extractText(node)` helper to recursively pull all text from node children
- **Slug generation**: 
  - Calls `textToSlug(text)` to convert heading text into URL-safe format
  - **Slug algorithm**: Lowercase ‚Üí trim ‚Üí remove non-word chars (preserves CJK/Hangul: `\u3001-\u9fff`, `\uac00-\ud7af`, `\uff00-\uffef`) ‚Üí collapse underscores/spaces to hyphens ‚Üí strip leading/trailing hyphens
  - **Deduplication logic**: Uses `headingSlugs` Map to track existing slugs
    - First occurrence: slug registered with count=1
    - Subsequent duplicates: appended with `-{count}` suffix (e.g., `my-heading-1`, `my-heading-2`)
- **HTML structure**:
  ```jsx
  <Tag id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    {slug && (
      <a className="rich-heading-anchor" aria-hidden="true" tabIndex={-1} href={`#${slug}`} />
    )}
    {children}
  </Tag>
  ```
  - **ID attribute**: Applied only if slug is non-empty
  - **Anchor link**: Invisible anchor element with class `rich-heading-anchor`, aria-hidden, non-focusable, points to `#${slug}`
  - **Class name**: Dynamic based on heading level (e.g., `rich-heading-h2`)

**Slug utility location**: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/preprocess/headingSlug.ts` (exported for reuse)

---

### **3. ENGINE/renderBuiltinNode.tsx ‚Äî COMPREHENSIVE BREAKDOWN**

**Purpose**: Core renderer for 20+ built-in Lexical node types

**Key sections**:
- **Lines 10-17**: `textToSlug()` function (slug generation logic)
- **Lines 19-23**: `extractText()` helper (recursive text extraction from nested nodes)
- **Lines 25-226**: Main `renderBuiltinNode()` function with 20+ node type handlers

**Node types handled**:
1. `root` ‚Äî returns fragment of children
2. `paragraph` ‚Äî `<p>` with optional text alignment via `node.format`
3. `heading` ‚Äî **detailed above**, generates IDs + anchor links
4. `quote` ‚Äî `<blockquote class="rich-quote">`
5. `list` ‚Äî `<ol>` (numbered) or `<ul>` (unordered/checklist)
6. `listitem` ‚Äî `<li>` with detection of nested lists and checklist state
7. `link` ‚Äî `<a>` with LinkFavicon component + target/rel attributes
8. `autolink` ‚Äî similar to link but hardcoded `target="_blank"`, `rel="noopener"`
9. `horizontalrule` ‚Äî `<hr class="rich-hr">`
10. `table` ‚Äî wrapped in div with overflow-x auto
11. `tablerow` ‚Äî `<tr>`
12. `tablecell` ‚Äî `<th>` or `<td>` with colSpan support
13. `details` ‚Äî `<details>` with collapsible summary + animated chevron SVG
14. `spoiler` ‚Äî `<span class="rich-spoiler">` (button role)
15. `ruby` ‚Äî delegates to RendererWrapper (Japanese ruby annotations)
16. `code` ‚Äî `<pre><code>` (code block)
17. `code-highlight` ‚Äî `<span>` with syntax highlighting
18. `linebreak` ‚Äî `<br>`
19. `tab` ‚Äî two spaces wrapped in `<span>`
20. Default case ‚Äî returns null

**Key design patterns**:
- Recursive rendering via `renderTree()` (from RichRenderer.tsx)
- Passes `headingSlugs` Map down the tree for deduplication
- Some nodes delegate to `RendererWrapper` (ruby, custom renderers)
- Uses Vanilla Extract CSS for table styling

---

### **4. ID GENERATION & SLUG UTILITIES**

**Primary function**: `textToSlug()` in two locations:
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/preprocess/headingSlug.ts` (exported utility)
- `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx` (inline version)

**Algorithm** (identical in both):
```typescript
text
  .toLowerCase()                           // 1. Lowercase
  .trim()                                  // 2. Trim whitespace
  .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')  // 3. Remove non-word chars except CJK/Hangul/symbols
  .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')             // 4. Collapse whitespace/underscores to hyphens
  .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')             // 5. Strip leading/trailing hyphens
```

**Character ranges preserved**:
- `\w` ‚Äî standard word chars (a-z, 0-9, _)
- `\u3001-\u9fff` ‚Äî CJK unified ideographs (Chinese/Japanese/Korean characters)
- `\uac00-\ud7af` ‚Äî Hangul syllables (Korean)
- `\uff00-\uffef` ‚Äî Halfwidth/fullwidth forms (Japanese symbols)

**Deduplication in renderBuiltinNode** (lines 49-56):
```typescript
const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
if (count !== undefined) {
  slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
  headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
} else {
  headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
}
```

---

**Package.json**:

---

### **6. EXISTING HEADING ANCHOR LINK SUPPORT**

**YES ‚Äî heading anchor links are fully implemented!**

Current implementation (renderBuiltinNode.tsx, lines 58-70):
```jsx
<Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
  {slug && (
    <a
      className="rich-heading-anchor"
      aria-hidden="true"
      tabIndex={-1}
      href={`#${slug}`}
    />
  )}
  {children}
</Tag>
```

**Features**:
- **ID on heading**: `id={slug}` makes heading linkable
- **Anchor link element**: Invisible `<a>` with:
  - `aria-hidden="true"` ‚Äî hidden from screen readers
  - `tabIndex={-1}` ‚Äî non-focusable
  - `href={`#${slug}`}` ‚Äî points to heading ID
  - `class="rich-heading-anchor"` ‚Äî can be styled (e.g., show on hover)
- **Only rendered if slug exists** ‚Äî empty headings get no anchor
- **Deduplication**: Handles duplicate heading text (appends `-1`, `-2`, etc.)
- **I18n support**: Preserves CJK/Hangul characters in slugs

**CSS integration**: 
- Heading class: `rich-heading-{h1|h2|h3|h4|h5|h6}` (can style each level)
- Anchor class: `rich-heading-anchor` (can add `::before` pseudo-element, show on hover, etc.)

---

### **7. RENDERING PIPELINE (FROM DATA TO HTML)**

**Flow** (RichRenderer.tsx):
1. **Parse**: `editor.parseEditorState(value)` ‚Äî convert JSON ‚Üí Lexical editor state
2. **Read**: `editorState.read(() => ...)` ‚Äî enter read mode to traverse tree
3. **Render tree recursively**:
   - `renderTree()` processes each node depth-first
   - Calls `renderBuiltinNode()` for Lexical nodes
   - Passes `headingSlugs` Map down for deduplication
   - Wraps with `applyBlockId()` if `blockId` metadata exists
4. **Wrap in providers**: ColorSchemeProvider, RendererConfigProvider, etc.
5. **SSR output**: Fragment of React elements (can use `renderToString()`)

**Key context**:
- `headingSlugs`: Tracks used slugs across entire document (lines 89, 169, 204 in RichRenderer.tsx)
- Initialized fresh for each render: `const headingSlugs = new Map<string, number>()`
- Used only for heading deduplication, not stored

---

### **8. TABLE STYLING (Vanilla Extract)**

`table.css.ts` ‚Äî static CSS generation:
- **Wrapper**: `overflow-x: auto` for responsive tables
- **Table**: 100% width, small font, border-collapse
- **Header cells** (`th`): bottom border, secondary text color, no-wrap
- **Body cells** (`td`): padding, alternating bg colors
- **Hover states**: transparent on non-hovered even rows when any row hovered
- **Responsive**: paragraph margins reset inside cells

---

### **9. FOOTNOTE PREPROCESSING**

`preprocess/footnote.ts` ‚Äî preprocesses footnote data:
- **Walk entire state tree** recursively
- **Collect**: `footnote` nodes (by identifier) + `footnote-section` nodes (definitions)
- **Track display order** ‚Äî assigns counter 1, 2, 3... in encounter order
- **Return**: `{ definitions: Record<string, string>, displayNumberMap: Record<string, number> }`
- **Used in RichRenderer**: Passed to `FootnoteDefinitionsProvider` context

---

### **10. INTERNAL RENDERING MECHANICS**

**Text node rendering** (renderTextNode.tsx):
- **Format flags**: Bold (1), italic (2), strikethrough (4), underline (8), code (16), subscript (32), superscript (64), highlight (128)
- **Bitwise check**: `format & flag` to detect applied formatting
- **Nested spans**: Each format wraps previous in a new span with class (e.g., `rich-text-bold`)
- **CSS parsing**: `parseCSSText()` converts CSS string to React CSSProperties

**Custom node delegation**:
- Ruby nodes ‚Üí `RendererWrapper` with `RendererWrapper` component
- Allows injection of custom renderers via `rendererConfig` prop

---

### **11. BUILD CONFIGURATION**

**Vite setup** (vite.config.ts):
- Uses `createViteConfig()` helper (shared across packages)
- JSX: automatic import from React
- Entry: `src/index.ts`
- Output: ESM `.mjs` + TypeScript declarations `.d.ts`

**TypeScript** (tsconfig.json):
- Target: ES2022
- Module: ESNext
- Strict mode enabled
- Declaration maps for debugging

---

### **SUMMARY TABLE**

| Aspect | Details |
|--------|---------|
| **Package Purpose** | Headless SSR renderer for Lexical rich content (read-only display) |
| **Main Export** | `RichRenderer` component |
| **Heading IDs** | Auto-generated from text via `textToSlug()` with deduplication |
| **Heading Anchors** | Built-in `<a>` element with `aria-hidden`, non-focusable |
| **Slug Algorithm** | Lowercase ‚Üí remove non-CJK/word chars ‚Üí hyphenate ‚Üí deduplicate |
| **Heading Classes** | `rich-heading-{h1..h6}` on tag + `rich-heading-anchor` on link |
| **I18n Support** | CJK (U+3001-U+9FFF), Hangul (UAC00-UD7AF), fullwidth (UFF00-UFFEF) preserved in slugs |
| **Node Types** | 20+ handlers (heading, list, table, details, spoiler, ruby, code, etc.) |
| **Deduplication** | Per-render Map tracks slug ‚Üí count, appends `-{count}` on duplicates |
| **Footnotes** | Preprocessed separately, display order assigned in encounter order |
| **Styling** | Vanilla Extract CSS (zero runtime), no Tailwind in this package |
| **Bundle Size** | ~44KB version, tree-shakes edit-only code, lightweight SSR |

---

This package is production-ready for heading anchor links. No additional implementation needed ‚Äî the infrastructure is already in place with slug generation, deduplication, and HTML `id`/`href` attributes.

case 'heading': {
  const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
  const text = extractText(node)
  const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
  let slug = baseSlug
  if (baseSlug) {
    const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    if (count !== undefined) {
      slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
      headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    } else {
      headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    }
  }
  return (
    <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
      {slug && (
        <a
          className="rich-heading-anchor"
          aria-hidden="true"
          tabIndex={-1}
          href={`#${slug}`}
        />
      )}
      {children}
    </Tag>
  )
}
```

## Summary: Heading ID Normalization and TocHeadingStrategy Usage

I've completed a thorough exploration of how heading ID normalization and the TocHeadingStrategy system work across the codebase. Here's the detailed analysis:

---

### 1. **TocHeadingStrategy Core Functions** (`<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy.tsx`)

#### Three Main Strategies:

| Function | Purpose | Used by |
|----------|---------|---------|
| **`textToSlug(text)`** | Converts heading text to URL-friendly slug | Core utility for ID generation |
| **`normalizeHeadingIds(headings)`** | Deduplicates heading IDs to prevent conflicts | `lexicalHeadingStrategy` |
| **`markdownHeadingStrategy`** | Queries markdown headings with `data-markdown-heading="true"` | Default strategy for markdown content |
| **`lexicalHeadingStrategy`** | Queries lexical editor headings (`.rich-heading-h1..h6`) + normalizes IDs | Used for lexical-formatted content |

**Key Logic - `textToSlug`:**
```typescript
text
  .toLowerCase()
  .trim()
  .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '') // Keep CJK + Korean
  .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
  .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '') // Trim leading/trailing dashes
```

**Key Logic - `normalizeHeadingIds`:**
- Maps existing IDs with deduplication counter
- Falls back to `textToSlug(textContent)` if heading has no ID
- Generates fallback `heading-${index+1}` if both ID and slug are empty
- Returns modified heading elements with unique IDs

#### Context Provider Pattern:

```typescript
<TocHeadingStrategyProvider
  contentFormat={data.contentFormat}  // 'lexical' or undefined
  content={data.content}
>
  {children}
</TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
```

Selects strategy based on `contentFormat === 'lexical'` to handle both markdown and lexical editor content.

---

### 2. **Usage Across Codebase**

#### A. **Page Layouts** (3 places pass the provider)

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(page-detail)/[slug]/layout.tsx`
- Wraps page detail content
- Receives `contentFormat` and `content` from `data`

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx`
- Wraps post content
- Used alongside `CurrentPostDataProvider` and `WrappedElementProvider`

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/notes/[id]/page.tsx`
- Wraps note content
- Used alongside `CurrentNoteDataProvider`

#### B. **TOC Components** (consume the strategy)

**`TocFAB`** - Mobile floating action button TOC:
```typescript
const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
setHeadings(queryHeadings($mainContentRender))  // Finds headings in MAIN_CONTENT_ID
```

**`TocAside`** - Desktop sidebar TOC:
```typescript
const queryHeadings = useTocHeadingStrategy()
const $headings = useMemo(() => {
  if (!$article) return []
  return queryHeadings($article)  // Queries from WrappedElementProvider
}, [$article, updated, queryHeadings])
```

**`TocTree`** - Renders heading tree:
- Extracts heading depth from `el.tagName.slice(1)` (h1‚Üí1, h2‚Üí2, etc.)
- Clones heading element and removes `del` and `.katex-container`
- Extracts title from `elClone.textContent`
- Creates `ITocItem` with `anchorId: el.id`
- Uses IntersectionObserver to track active heading
- Calls `springScrollToElement($el, -100)` on click

#### C. **Heading Renderers**

**Markdown Heading Component** (`<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/renderers/heading.tsx`):
```typescript
export const createMarkdownHeadingComponent = () => {
  let index = 0
  return (props: HeadingProps) => {
    const memoizedIndex = useMemo(() => {
      if (typeof ref.current === 'number') return ref.current
      ref.current = index++
      return ref.current
    }, [])
    return <MHeader index={memoizedIndex} {...props} />
  }
}

const MHeader = (props: HeadingProps & { index: number }) => {
  const { children, id, level, index } = props
  const nextId = `${index}__${id}`  // Prefixes ID with index
  return (
    <h{level}
      id={nextId}
      className="group flex items-center"
      data-markdown-heading="true"  // Tag for strategy query
    >
      <span>{children}</span>
      {isClient && (
        <a
          href={`#${nextId}`}
          onClick={(e) => {
            springScrollToElement(document.getElementById(nextId)!, -100)
            e.preventDefault()
          }}
        >
          <i className="i-mingcute-hashtag-line" />
        </a>
      )}
    </h{level}>
  )
}
```

---

### 3. **Lexical Heading Handling**

#### A. **Heading Anchor Plugin** (`<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/HeadingAnchorPlugin.tsx`)

Runs in editor (live):
```typescript
export function HeadingAnchorPlugin() {
  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
  useEffect(() => {
    const usedSlugs = new Map<string, number>()
    return editor.registerMutationListener(HeadingNode, (mutations) => {
      usedSlugs.clear()
      for (const [nodeKey, mutation] of mutations) {
        if (mutation === 'destroyed') continue
        const dom = editor.getElementByKey(nodeKey)
        if (!dom) continue
        const text = dom.textContent || ''
        const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
        if (!baseSlug) continue
        const slug = deduplicateSlug(baseSlug, usedSlugs)
        dom.id = slug
        // Add/update anchor link
        let anchor = dom.querySelector<HTMLAnchorElement>('.rich-heading-anchor')
        if (!anchor) {
          anchor = document.createElement('a')
          anchor.className = 'rich-heading-anchor'
          dom.prepend(anchor)
        }
        anchor.href = `#${slug}`
      }
    })
  }, [editor])
  return null
}
```

#### B. **Static Renderer** (`<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-static-renderer/src/engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx`)

Runs during SSR/static rendering:
```typescript
case 'heading': {
  const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
  const text = extractText(node)
  const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
  let slug = baseSlug
  if (baseSlug) {
    const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    if (count !== undefined) {
      slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
      headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    } else {
      headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    }
  }
  return (
    <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
      {slug && (
        <a
          className="rich-heading-anchor"
          aria-hidden="true"
          tabIndex={-1}
          href={`#${slug}`}
        />
      )}
      {children}
    </Tag>
  )
}
```

---

### 4. **Scroller Function** (`<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/lib/scroller.ts`)

**`springScrollToElement(element, delta = 40)`**:
- Calculates element's top position via `offsetParent` traversal
- Adds delta offset (typically -40 or -100)
- Uses `motion/react`'s `animateValue` with spring physics:
  - `stiffness: 1000`, `damping: 250`
  - Smooth scroll with wheel/touchmove cancellation
  - Returns animation promise

Used in:
- **Markdown heading click handler:** `springScrollToElement(document.getElementById(nextId)!, -100)`
- **TOC item click handler:** `springScrollToElement($el, -100).then(() => setActiveId(anchorId))`
- **Footnote reference click:** `springScrollToElement(document.getElementById(id)!, -window.innerHeight / 2)`

---

### 5. **Data Flow Diagram**

```
Page Layout
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ TocHeadingStrategyProvider
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ contentFormat: 'lexical' | undefined
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ content: string | null
‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ TocAside / TocFAB
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ useTocHeadingStrategy() ‚Üí strategy function
‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ queryHeadings($article) ‚Üí HTMLHeadingElement[]
‚îÇ   ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Returns with normalized IDs
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ TocTree
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Extracts ITocItem[] from headings
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ IntersectionObserver for active tracking
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ On click: springScrollToElement() + setActiveId()
‚îÇ
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Content Rendering
    ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Markdown: MHeader (data-markdown-heading="true")
    ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ ID = `${index}__${slug}`
    ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Lexical: HeadingAnchorPlugin + renderBuiltinNode
        ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ ID = slug (with deduplication)
```

---

### 6. **Key Design Patterns**

1. **Strategy Pattern**: Context-based heading query selection
2. **Deduplication**: Slug counters prevent duplicate IDs
3. **Fallback Chain**: Existing ID ‚Üí textToSlug ‚Üí generated ID
4. **Index Prefixing**: Markdown uses `${index}__${id}` to ensure uniqueness
5. **Spring Animation**: Smooth scrolling with interrupt handling
6. **IntersectionObserver**: Real-time active heading tracking without scroll events

---

### 7. **CJK & Character Support**

Both `textToSlug` implementations preserve:
- CJK characters (`\u3001-\u9fff`)
- Korean Hangul (`\uac00-\ud7af`)
- CJK Symbols & Punctuation (`\uff00-\uffef`)
- Basic alphanumeric + hyphen

**Two variants:**
- **TocHeadingStrategy:** Uses strict regex
- **HeadingAnchorPlugin/renderBuiltinNode:** Identical logic (duplicated)
- **Markdown slugify:** Different approach (basic ASCII transliteration)

---

### Files Summary

| File Path | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `TocHeadingStrategy.tsx` | Core heading query strategies + context |
| `TocFAB.tsx` | Mobile TOC trigger |
| `TocAside.tsx` | Desktop TOC sidebar |
| `TocTree.tsx` | Heading tree renderer + scroll handler |
| `TocItem.tsx` | Individual TOC item with styling |
| `heading.tsx` (markdown) | Markdown heading renderer with anchor links |
| `Markdown.tsx` | Markdown compiler integration |
| `HeadingAnchorPlugin.tsx` | Live editor heading ID assignment |
| `renderBuiltinNode.tsx` | SSR heading rendering |
| `scroller.ts` | Spring animation scroll utility |

Now I have a thorough understanding of the codebase. Let me summarize what I've learned and design a plan.

**Current State:**

1. **TocHeadingStrategy.tsx** (in apps/web) has:
   - `textToSlug()` - converts heading text to URL slug
   - `normalizeHeadingIds()` - deduplicates heading IDs for lexical headings
   - `lexicalHeadingStrategy` - queries lexical headings by class `.rich-heading-h{1-6}` and normalizes their IDs
   - `markdownHeadingStrategy` - queries markdown headings by `data-markdown-heading="true"`
   - `TocHeadingStrategyProvider` - context provider that selects strategy based on `contentFormat`

2. **rich-static-renderer** already has:
   - `textToSlug()` in both `preprocess/headingSlug.ts` AND `engine/renderBuiltinNode.tsx`
   - Heading rendering with slug generation and deduplication
   - Basic anchor `<a>` element with class `rich-heading-anchor`, but it's minimal (just aria-hidden, tabIndex=-1, no visual indicator like the hashtag icon)

3. **Markdown heading.tsx** (in apps/web) has a heading component that I'm still examining to understand its full structure.

The user wants me to move the heading ID normalization logic into the rich-static-renderer package itself, and enhance the renderer to support the visible hashtag anchor link with hover behavior and scroll functionality like the markdown version has. Since the renderer already generates heading IDs during SSR, I need to figure out where the client-side logic fits in.

The core tension is that the renderer's current anchor is hidden and non-interactive, but the app needs a visible, clickable hashtag link. The scroll behavior is app-specific since it depends on motion/react, but the visible anchor UI could potentially live in the renderer. I also need to keep the strategy pattern for querying headings from the DOM since the TOC still needs that capability.

For lexical content specifically, the renderer should output headings with an enhanced anchor that includes a visible hashtag icon showing on hover and uses basic hash navigation, while the app layer handles the smooth scroll animation on click.

In TocHeadingStrategy, I can simplify things since the renderer now handles ID generation and anchor markup‚Äîthe strategy just needs to query the rendered headings without normalizing IDs or duplicating slug logic. Looking at the current renderer implementation, I see it creates an anchor link positioned absolutely to the left with opacity hidden by default, but there's no actual icon content displayed. The markdown version has a visible icon with styling, so I need to add that visual element to the static renderer's anchor to match the expected UX. I can use a `#` symbol via CSS `::before` pseudo-element since the renderer is a standalone package that shouldn't depend on Tailwind icons. The hover behavior can be purely CSS-based with `:hover` on the parent heading to show the anchor. For the heading rendering in `renderBuiltinNode.tsx`, I need to keep the existing slug generation and deduplication, then enhance the anchor element with visible content and make it properly interactive.

For the styles in `shared.css.ts`, I'll add `::before` or `::after` content displaying the `#` symbol that appears on hover, styled to match the markdown heading anchor. Then in the TOC strategy, I can simplify it to just query the headings since they'll already have IDs from the renderer, removing the duplicate slug generation and normalization logic.

But I'm realizing the markdown heading renderer is separate from the rich-static-renderer concern. The user wants the static renderer to handle the anchor UI/UX, but the markdown renderer already has click behavior that handles history navigation and smooth scrolling. Since the static renderer is for SSR, it can't have onClick handlers‚Äîthe `href="#slug"` provides basic navigation, and I need to think about how smooth scrolling fits in.

Actually, the RichRenderer doesn't have a 'use client' directive, so it's a server component and can't add client-side interactivity directly. The right approach is to render the anchor with `href="#slug"` for native hash navigation and let the app layer handle smooth scroll enhancement if needed‚Äîthat's the proper separation of concerns.

Wait, I need to re-read what the user actually asked for. They want the ID normalization logic moved into the package's rich static renderer, and they also want the renderer to support heading anchor UI/UX similar to what markdown already has. So I should ensure the renderer's ID generation is solid, remove the redundant client-side normalization from the TOC strategy, and add the anchor UI component to the renderer itself.

    10‚Üífunction textToSlug(text: string): string {
    11‚Üí  return text
    12‚Üí    .toLowerCase()
    13‚Üí    .trim()
    14‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[^\w\s\u3001-\u9fff\uac00-\ud7af\uff00-\uffef-]/g, '')
    15‚Üí    .replaceAll(/[\s_]+/g, '-')
    16‚Üí    .replaceAll(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    17‚Üí}
    18‚Üí
    19‚Üífunction extractText(node: any): string {
    20‚Üí  if (node.text) return node.text
    21‚Üí  if (node.children) return node.children.map(extractText).join('')
    22‚Üí  return ''
    23‚Üí}
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üíexport function renderBuiltinNode(
    26‚Üí  node: any,
    27‚Üí  key: string,
    28‚Üí  children: ReactNode[] | null,
    29‚Üí  headingSlugs: Map<string, number>,
    30‚Üí): ReactNode {
    31‚Üí  switch (node.type) {
    32‚Üí    case 'root':
    33‚Üí      return <>{children}</>
    34‚Üí    case 'paragraph': {
    35‚Üí      const align = node.format
    36‚Üí        ? ({ textAlign: node.format } as const)
    37‚Üí        : undefined
    38‚Üí      return (
    39‚Üí        <p key={key} className="rich-paragraph" style={align}>
    40‚Üí          {children}
    41‚Üí        </p>
    42‚Üí      )
    43‚Üí    }
    44‚Üí    case 'heading': {
    45‚Üí      const Tag = node.tag as 'h1' | 'h2' | 'h3' | 'h4' | 'h5' | 'h6'
    46‚Üí      const text = extractText(node)
    47‚Üí      const baseSlug = textToSlug(text)
    48‚Üí      let slug = baseSlug
    49‚Üí      if (baseSlug) {
    50‚Üí        const count = headingSlugs.get(baseSlug)
    51‚Üí        if (count !== undefined) {
    52‚Üí          slug = `${baseSlug}-${count}`
    53‚Üí          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, count + 1)
    54‚Üí        } else {
    55‚Üí          headingSlugs.set(baseSlug, 1)
    56‚Üí        }
    57‚Üí      }
    58‚Üí      return (
    59‚Üí        <Tag key={key} id={slug || undefined} className={`rich-heading-${Tag}`}>
    60‚Üí          {slug && (
    61‚Üí            <a
    62‚Üí              className="rich-heading-anchor"
    63‚Üí              aria-hidden="true"
    64‚Üí              tabIndex={-1}
    65‚Üí              href={`#${slug}`}
    66‚Üí            />
    67‚Üí          )}
    68‚Üí          {children}
    69‚Üí        </Tag>
    70‚Üí      )
    71‚Üí    }
    72‚Üí    case 'quote':
    73‚Üí      return (
    74‚Üí        <blockquote key={key} className="rich-quote">
    75‚Üí          {children}
    76‚Üí        </blockquote>
    77‚Üí      )
    78‚Üí    case 'list': {
    79‚Üí      const Tag = node.listType === 'number' ? 'ol' : 'ul'
    80‚Üí      const cls =
    81‚Üí        node.listType === 'number'
    82‚Üí          ? 'rich-list-ol'
    83‚Üí          : node.listType === 'check'
    84‚Üí            ? 'rich-checklist rich-list-ul'
    85‚Üí            : 'rich-list-ul'
    86‚Üí      return (
    87‚Üí        <Tag
    88‚Üí          key={key}
    89‚Üí          className={cls}
    90‚Üí          start={node.start !== 1 ? node.start : undefined}
    91‚Üí        >
    92‚Üí          {children}
    93‚Üí        </Tag>
    94‚Üí      )
    95‚Üí    }
    96‚Üí    case 'listitem': {
    97‚Üí      const isChecklist = node.checked !== undefined
    98‚Üí      const hasNestedList = node.children?.some((c: any) => c.type === 'list')
    99‚Üí      let cls: string
   100‚Üí      if (hasNestedList) {
   101‚Üí        cls = 'rich-list-nested-item'
   102‚Üí      } else if (isChecklist) {
   103‚Üí        cls = node.checked
   104‚Üí          ? 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-checked'
   105‚Üí          : 'rich-list-item rich-list-item-unchecked'
   106‚Üí      } else {
   107‚Üí        cls = 'rich-list-item'
   108‚Üí      }
   109‚Üí      return (
   110‚Üí        <li key={key} className={cls} value={node.value}>
   111‚Üí          {children}
   112‚Üí        </li>
   113‚Üí      )
   114‚Üí    }
   115‚Üí    case 'link':

   117‚Üí        <a

   131‚Üí          key={key}
   132‚Üí          className="rich-link"
   133‚Üí          href={node.url}
   134‚Üí          target="_blank"
   135‚Üí          rel="noopener"
   136‚Üí        >
   137‚Üí          <LinkFavicon href={node.url} />
   138‚Üí          {children}
   139‚Üí        </a>
   140‚Üí      )
   141‚Üí    case 'horizontalrule':
   142‚Üí      return <hr key={key} className="rich-hr" />
   143‚Üí    case 'table':
   144‚Üí      return (
   145‚Üí        <div key={key} className={tableStyles.tableWrapper}>

   147‚Üí        </div>
   148‚Üí      )
   149‚Üí    case 'tablerow':
   150‚Üí      return <tr key={key}>{children}</tr>
   151‚Üí    case 'tablecell': {

   165‚Üí    }
   166‚Üí    case 'details': {
   167‚Üí      const summary = node.summary || ''
   168‚Üí      return (

   173‚Üí        >
   174‚Üí          <summary className="rich-details-summary">
   175‚Üí            <span className="rich-details-summary-text">{summary}</span>

   312‚Üí// Checkbox box

   322‚Üí    border: `2px solid color-mix(in oklab, ${vars.color.textSecondary} 60%, transparent)`,

   342‚Üí// Checkmark (clip-path animation, rotated to form check shape)
   343‚ÜíglobalStyle(
   344‚Üí  `${richContent} .rich-list-item.rich-list-item-unchecked::after, ${richContent} .rich-list-item.rich-list-item-checked::after`,
   345‚Üí  {
   346‚Üí    content: '""',

   351‚Üí    height: 'var(--rc-cb-size)',
   352‚Üí    opacity: 0,
   353‚Üí    clipPath: 'polygon(20% 100%, 20% 80%, 50% 80%, 50% 80%, 70% 80%, 70% 100%)',
   354‚Üí    backgroundColor: 'white',
   355‚Üí    boxSizing: 'border-box',
   356‚Üí    display: 'block',
   357‚Üí    pointerEvents: 'none',
   358‚Üí    transform: 'rotate(45deg)',

I should note in the plan that the web app could add a global click handler for these anchor elements to implement the smooth scroll and `replaceState` behavior consistently across the board.
